We evaluate Equilibrium Propagation (EP), an energy-based learning method that does not use backpropagation (incompatible with quantum systems due to state-collapsing measurements) and Variational Quantum Circuits (VQCs) for automated detection of Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) from blood cell microscopy images using binary classification (2 classes: AML vs. Healthy). Key Result: Using limited subsets (50-250 samples per class) of the AML-Cytomorphology dataset (18,365 expert-annotated images), quantum methods achieve performance only 12-15% below classical CNNs despite reduced image resolution (64x64 pixels), engineered features (20D), and classical simulation via Qiskit. EP reaches 86.4% accuracy (only 12% below CNN) without backpropagation, while the 4-qubit VQC attains 83.0% accuracy with consistent data efficiency: VQC maintains stable 83% performance with only 50 samples per class, whereas CNN requires 250 samples (5x more data) to reach 98%. These results establish reproducible baselines for QML in healthcare, validating NISQ-era feasibility.

【4】The Quantum Cliff: A Critical Proton Tunneling Threshold Determines Clinical Severity in RPE65-Mediated Retinal Disease
- **标题**: 量子悬崖：关键的质子隧道阈值决定 RPE65 介导的视网膜疾病的临床严重程度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18435
> **作者**: Biraja Ghoshal
> **摘要**: 从基因型预测临床严重程度仍然是分子医学中的一个基本挑战，特别是对于其功能取决于亚原子尺度几何形状的酶。 \textit{RPE65} 异构水解酶突变会导致莱伯先天性黑蒙 (LCA) 和相关视网膜疾病；然而，将亚原子尺度的扰动与失明联系起来的动力学机制仍不清楚。在这项研究中，我们证明人类视觉异构酶 RPE65 中的突变受到活性位点质子隧道效应产生的量子力学阈值效应的控制。我们建立了一种混合量子经典结构到表型的管道，将 AlphaFold 结构预测与 \textit{ab initio} 量子模拟相结合，使用变分量子本征解算器 (VQE) 来分析视觉循环中的最小质子耦合电子转移。我们的分析表明，许多致病突变不仅会遮挡活性位点，还会大大降低质子隧道的量子概率。我们观察到一种尖锐的非线性效应，称为“量子悬崖”，其中微小的结构变化（低于 0.1 Å）会使反应速率降低多个数量级。基于这些发现，我们引入了无量纲相对量子活性评分（RQAS），它分离了反应速率的几何控制指数敏感性，并成功区分了轻度和重度患者表型。这些结果表明，RPE65 在量子临界点附近运行，其中亚埃结构扰动会导致灾难性的功能丧失。此外，我们的研究结果将量子隧道效应确立为原子结构和临床表型之间的预测机制联系，提出了量子结构疾病建模的通用框架。
> **Abstract**: Predicting clinical severity from genotype remains a fundamental challenge in molecular medicine, particularly for enzymes whose function depends on sub-atomic-scale geometry. Mutations in the \textit{RPE65} isomerohydrolase cause Leber Congenital Amaurosis (LCA) and related retinal diseases; however, the kinetic mechanisms connecting sub-atomic-scale perturbations to blindness remain unclear. In this study, we demonstrate that mutations in the human visual isomerase RPE65 are governed by a quantum-mechanical threshold effect arising from proton tunneling in the active site. We established a hybrid quantum-classical structure-to-phenotype pipeline combining AlphaFold structure prediction with \textit{ab initio} quantum simulation using the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) to analyze minimal proton-coupled electron transfer in the visual cycle. Our analysis reveals that many pathogenic mutations do not merely occlude the active site, but rather strongly reduce the quantum probability of proton tunneling. We observed a sharp non-linear effect, termed the "Quantum Cliff," where minute structural changes (below 0.1 Å) reduce the reaction rate by multiple orders of magnitude. Based on these findings, we introduce a dimensionless Relative Quantum Activity Score (RQAS) that isolates the geometry-controlled exponential sensitivity of the reaction rate and successfully distinguishes between mild and severe patient phenotypes. These results suggest that RPE65 operates near a quantum-critical point, where sub-Angstrom structural perturbations induce a catastrophic loss of function. Furthermore, our findings establish quantum tunneling as a predictive mechanistic link between atomic structure and clinical phenotype, proposing a general framework for quantum-structural disease modeling.

【5】Eyes on the Mission: Mixed Methods Assessment of Eye-Tracker-Enabled Interactive Decision Support in a Simulated Unmanned Aerial Vehicle System
- **标题**: 着眼于使命：模拟无人机系统中眼动仪支持的交互式决策支持的混合方法评估
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18015
> **作者**: Hyun-Gee Jei,Mustafa Demir,Farzan Sasangohar
> **摘要**: 军事指挥与控制 (C2) 环境中的主管面临动态条件。动态变化的信息通过多个显示器不断地流向主管。在这种环境中，由于任务和环境的复杂性，重要的信息可能会被忽视。本研究在模拟 C2 环境中检验了基于眼动仪的自适应注意力引导决策支持工具 (DST) 的功效，供主管使用。 DST 实时监控主管的视觉注意力分配，并在错过关键变化或事件时显示视觉显着线索。二十五名军校学生参加了模拟情报任务。结果表明，当存在自适应 DST 时，性能显着提高。眼球追踪分析还表明，长时间、频繁地注视关键兴趣领域与表现呈负相关。此外，实验后采访显示，自适应夏令时并不引人注目，并且受到了积极的欢迎。这些发现强调了基于凝视的实时干预措施在优化监督决策方面的潜力。未来的研究可以结合人工智能驱动的方法，以更好地支持复杂任务环境中的主管。
> **Abstract**: Supervisors in military command and control (C2) environments face dynamic conditions. Dynamically changing information continuously flows to the supervisors through multiple displays. In this environment, important pieces of information can be overlooked due to the complexity of tasks and environments. This study examined the efficacy of an eye-tracker-based adaptive attention-guided decision support tool (DST) for supervisors in a simulated C2 environment. The DST monitors supervisors' visual attention allocation in real time and displays visually salient cues if critical changes or events are missed. Twenty-five military students participated in a simulated intelligence task. Results indicated significant performance enhancement when the adaptive DST was present. Eye-tracking analysis also showed that longer, more frequent fixations on critical areas of interest were negatively correlated with performance. Additionally, post-experiment interviews revealed that the adaptive DST was unobtrusive and positively received. These findings underscore the potential of real-time gaze-based interventions to optimize supervisory decision-making. Future research could incorporate AI-driven approaches to better support supervisors in complex task environments.

## 图形(cs.GR:Graphics)

【1】ClipGS-VR: Immersive and Interactive Cinematic Visualization of Volumetric Medical Data in Mobile Virtual Reality
- **标题**: ClipGS-VR：移动虚拟现实中体积医疗数据的沉浸式交互式电影可视化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19310
> **作者**: Yuqi Tong,Ruiyang Li,Chengkun Li,Qixuan Liu,Shi Qiu,Pheng-Ann Heng
> **摘要**: 移动虚拟现实 (VR) 上的高保真电影医学可视化仍然具有挑战性。尽管 ClipGS 可以通过 3D 高斯分布进行横截面探索，但它缺乏消费级 VR 耳机上的任意角度切片。为了实现实时交互性能，我们引入了ClipGS-VR，并将ClipGS的神经推理重构为一个统一的数据集，将来自多个预先计算的切片状态的高保真层集成到一个统一的渲染结构中。我们的框架还通过基于梯度的不透明度调制支持任意角度切片，以实现平滑、视觉连贯的渲染。评估证实我们的方法保持了与离线结果相当的视觉保真度，同时提供了卓越的可用性和交互效率。
> **Abstract**: High-fidelity cinematic medical visualization on mobile virtual reality (VR) remains challenging. Although ClipGS enables cross-sectional exploration via 3D Gaussian Splatting, it lacks arbitrary-angle slicing on consumer-grade VR headsets. To achieve real-time interactive performance, we introduce ClipGS-VR and restructure ClipGS's neural inference into a consolidated dataset, integrating high-fidelity layers from multiple pre-computed slicing states into a unified rendering structure. Our framework further supports arbitrary-angle slicing via gradient-based opacity modulation for smooth, visually coherent rendering. Evaluations confirm our approach maintains visual fidelity comparable to offline results while offering superior usability and interaction efficiency.

【2】Words have Weight: Comparing the use of pressure and weight as a metaphor in a User Interface in Virtual Reality
- **标题**: 文字有重量：比较压力和重量在虚拟现实用户界面中作为隐喻的使用
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19294
> **作者**: Joffrey Guilmet,Suzanne Sorli,Diego Vilela Monteiro
> **摘要**: 这项工作研究了重量和压力如何作为触觉隐喻来支持虚拟现实 (VR) 中的用户界面通知。虽然之前的研究已经探索了没有根据的重量模拟和气动反馈，但它们在通过 UI 元素传达信息方面的综合作用仍未得到充分探索。我们开发了一种可穿戴触觉设备，可将液体和空气转移到安装在用户手背上的柔性容器中，使我们能够独立操纵重量和压力。通过使用三种条件（无反馈、仅重量以及重量与压力相结合）的初步评估，我们研究了这些信号如何影响感知的重量、与视觉线索的一致性以及感知的通知紧迫性。我们的结果证实，压力会增强对重量的感知，但这种增加的重量并不会转化为更高的紧迫感。这些发现表明，虽然压力增强权重可以丰富 VR 中 UI 元素的触觉渲染，但其对传达紧迫性的贡献可能需要进一步研究、替代压力分布或不同类型的通知。
> **Abstract**: This work investigates how weight and pressure can function as haptic metaphors to support user interface notifications in Virtual Reality (VR). While prior research has explored ungrounded weight simulation and pneumatic feedback, their combined role in conveying information through UI elements remains underexplored. We developed a wearable haptic device that transfers liquid and air into flexible containers mounted on the back of the user's hand, allowing us to independently manipulate weight and pressure. Through an initial evaluation using three conditions-no feedback, weight only, and weight combined with pressure-we examined how these signals affect perceived heaviness, coherence with visual cues, and the perceived urgency of notifications. Our results validate that pressure amplifies the perception of weight, but this increased heaviness does not translate into higher perceived urgency. These findings suggest that while pressure___enhanced weight can enrich haptic rendering of UI elements in VR, its contribution to communicating urgency may require further investigation, alternative pressure profiles, or different types of notifications.

【3】LoD-Structured 3D Gaussian Splatting for Streaming Video Reconstruction
- **标题**: 用于流视频重建的 LoD 结构 3D 高斯泼溅
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18475
> **作者**: Xinhui Liu,Can Wang,Lei Liu,Zhenghao Chen,Wei Jiang,Wei Wang,Dong Xu
> **摘要**: 自由视点视频 (FVV) 重建可实现逼真的交互式 3D 场景可视化；然而，实时流媒体通常受到稀疏视图输入、过高的训练成本和带宽限制的瓶颈。虽然最近的 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 由于其卓越的渲染速度而具有先进的 FVV，但流式自由视点视频 (SFVV) 引入了对快速优化、稀疏约束下的高保真重建以及最小存储占用的额外需求。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 StreamLoD-GS，这是一种专为 SFVV 设计的基于 LoD 的高斯 Splatting 框架。我们的方法集成了三个核心创新：1）基于Anchor和八叉树的LoD结构3DGS，采用分层高斯dropout技术，确保高效稳定的优化，同时保持高质量渲染； 2) 基于 GMM 的运动划分机制，可分离动态和静态内容，细化动态区域，同时保持背景稳定性； 3）量化残差细化框架，可在不影响视觉保真度的情况下显着降低存储需求。大量实验表明 StreamLoD-GS 在质量、效率和存储方面实现了具有竞争力或最先进的性能。
> **Abstract**: Free-Viewpoint Video (FVV) reconstruction enables photorealistic and interactive 3D scene visualization; however, real-time streaming is often bottlenecked by sparse-view inputs, prohibitive training costs, and bandwidth constraints. While recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has advanced FVV due to its superior rendering speed, Streaming Free-Viewpoint Video (SFVV) introduces additional demands for rapid optimization, high-fidelity reconstruction under sparse constraints, and minimal storage footprints. To bridge this gap, we propose StreamLoD-GS, an LoD-based Gaussian Splatting framework designed specifically for SFVV. Our approach integrates three core innovations: 1) an Anchor- and Octree-based LoD-structured 3DGS with a hierarchical Gaussian dropout technique to ensure efficient and stable optimization while maintaining high-quality rendering; 2) a GMM-based motion partitioning mechanism that separates dynamic and static content, refining dynamic regions while preserving background stability; and 3) a quantized residual refinement framework that significantly reduces storage requirements without compromising visual fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StreamLoD-GS achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance in terms of quality, efficiency, and storage.

## 计算机科学与博弈论(cs.GT:Computer Science and Game Theory)

【1】Ad Insertion in LLM-Generated Responses
- **标题**: LLM 生成的回复中的广告插入
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19435
> **作者**: Shengwei Xu,Zhaohua Chen,Xiaotie Deng,Zhiyi Huang,Grant Schoenebeck
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型（LLM）的可持续货币化仍然是一个重大的开放挑战。传统的搜索广告依赖于静态关键字，无法捕捉嵌入在会话流中的短暂的、依赖于上下文的用户意图——用户寻求的特定信息、商品或服务。除了社会福利最大化的标准目标之外，有效的法学硕士广告还对上下文一致性（确保广告在语义上与短暂的用户意图保持一致）和计算效率（避免用户交互延迟）以及遵守道德和监管标准提出了额外的要求，包括保护隐私和确保明确的广告披露。尽管最近的各种解决方案已经探索了令牌级别和查询级别的出价，但这两种方法通常都无法全面满足这组多方面的约束。我们提出了一个实用的框架，通过两种脱钩策略来解决这些紧张局势。首先，我们将广告插入与响应生成分离，以确保安全和明确披露。其次，我们通过使用“流派”（高级语义集群）作为代理，将出价与特定用户查询解耦。这使得广告商可以对稳定的类别而不是敏感的实时响应进行竞价，从而减少计算负担和隐私风险。我们证明，将 VCG 拍卖机制应用于这种基于类型的框架可以产生近似的主导策略激励兼容性（DSIC）和个体理性（IR），以及近似最优的社会福利，同时保持高计算效率。最后，我们引入了“LLM-as-a-Judge”指标来估计上下文连贯性。我们的实验表明，该指标与人类评分密切相关（Spearman 的 $ρ\约 0.66$），优于 80% 的人类评估者。
> **Abstract**: Sustainable monetization of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a critical open challenge. Traditional search advertising, which relies on static keywords, fails to capture the fleeting, context-dependent user intents--the specific information, goods, or services a user seeks--embedded in conversational flows. Beyond the standard goal of social welfare maximization, effective LLM advertising imposes additional requirements on contextual coherence (ensuring ads align semantically with transient user intents) and computational efficiency (avoiding user interaction latency), as well as adherence to ethical and regulatory standards, including preserving privacy and ensuring explicit ad disclosure. Although various recent solutions have explored bidding on token-level and query-level, both categories of approaches generally fail to holistically satisfy this multifaceted set of constraints. We propose a practical framework that resolves these tensions through two decoupling strategies. First, we decouple ad insertion from response generation to ensure safety and explicit disclosure. Second, we decouple bidding from specific user queries by using ``genres'' (high-level semantic clusters) as a proxy. This allows advertisers to bid on stable categories rather than sensitive real-time response, reducing computational burden and privacy risks. We demonstrate that applying the VCG auction mechanism to this genre-based framework yields approximately dominant strategy incentive compatibility (DSIC) and individual rationality (IR), as well as approximately optimal social welfare, while maintaining high computational efficiency. Finally, we introduce an "LLM-as-a-Judge" metric to estimate contextual coherence. Our experiments show that this metric correlates strongly with human ratings (Spearman's $ρ\approx 0.66$), outperforming 80% of individual human evaluators.

【2】Differential Voting: Loss Functions For Axiomatically Diverse Aggregation of Heterogeneous Preferences
- **标题**: 差分投票：异质偏好的公理多样化聚合的损失函数
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18824
> **作者**: Zhiyu An,Duaa Nakshbandi,Wan Du
> **摘要**: 来自人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）隐式地将不同的人类偏好聚合到一个单一的效用函数中，尽管参与者的潜在效用实际上是多种多样的。因此，RLHF 可以被视为一种投票形式，其中聚合机制由损失函数定义。尽管阿罗不可能定理表明不同的机制满足不同的理想公理集，但大多数现有方法依赖于单一聚合原则，通常是 Bradley-Terry-Luce (BTL) 模型，它对应于 Borda 计数投票。这限制了学习奖励的公理属性，并模糊了优化中嵌入的规范假设。在这项工作中，我们引入了差分投票，这是一个统一的框架，它构建了实例方面的可微损失函数，其群体水平最优值可证明对应于不同的经典投票规则。我们为基于多数的聚合 (BTL)、Copeland 和 Kemeny 规则开发可微分代理，并正式分析它们的校准属性、梯度场和平滑参数消失时的限制行为。对于每一个损失，我们都与相应的社会选择规则建立一致性，并描述它满足或违反的公理。我们的分析显示了损失几何中的设计选择（例如裕度敏感性和边界集中度）如何直接转化为规范聚合行为。差分投票使偏好聚合成为 RLHF 中明确且可控的设计选择，从而实现公理保证和优化稳定性之间的原则性权衡。重现我们实验的代码是开源的。
> **Abstract**: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) implicitly aggregates heterogeneous human preferences into a single utility function, even though the underlying utilities of the participants are in practice diverse. Hence, RLHF can be viewed as a form of voting, where the aggregation mechanism is defined by the loss function. Although Arrow's Impossibility Theorem suggests that different mechanisms satisfy different sets of desirable axioms, most existing methods rely on a single aggregation principle, typically the Bradley-Terry-Luce (BTL) model, which corresponds to Borda count voting. This restricts the axiomatic properties of the learned reward and obscures the normative assumptions embedded in optimization. In this work, we introduce Differential Voting, a unifying framework that constructs instance-wise, differentiable loss functions whose population-level optima provably correspond to distinct classical voting rules. We develop differentiable surrogates for majority-based aggregation (BTL), Copeland, and Kemeny rules, and formally analyze their calibration properties, gradient fields, and limiting behavior as smoothing parameters vanish. For each loss, we establish consistency with the corresponding social choice rule and characterize the axioms it satisfies or violates. Our analysis shows how design choices in loss geometry-such as margin sensitivity and boundary concentration-directly translate into normative aggregation behavior. Differential Voting makes preference aggregation an explicit and controllable design choice in RLHF, enabling principled trade-offs between axiomatic guarantees and optimization stability. Code to reproduce our experiments is open-sourced.

【3】Stable Matching with Deviators and Conformists
- **标题**: 与偏差者和顺从者的稳定匹配
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18573
> **作者**: Frederik Glitzner,David Manlove
> **摘要**: 在基本的稳定婚姻和稳定室友问题中，解决方案的规模和稳定性之间存在固有的权衡。虽然在前一个问题中，稳定匹配总是存在，并且可以使用著名的 Gale-Shapley 算法有效地找到，但在后一个问题中不能保证稳定匹配的存在，但可以使用 Irving 算法有效地确定。然而，由于对匹配大小的附加约束的存在或由于限制性偏好循环的存在，最小化不稳定性的匹配计算会产生一系列臭名昭著的棘手的几乎稳定的匹配问题。然而，在实践中，并不是每个代理都能够或可能发起由阻塞对引起的偏差。例如，假设我们知道，由于基于历史数据的一组要求或估计，哪些主体可能会发起偏差（即偏差者），而哪些主体可能会遵守向他们提供的任何匹配项（即墨守成规者）。我们能否有效地决定是否存在没有偏差者阻塞的匹配，即没有偏差者有动机发起偏差的匹配？此外，我们能否找到只有少数偏差被阻塞的匹配？我们在双边和非双边偏好设置中描述了这个问题的计算复杂性。令人惊讶的是，这些问题在计算上被证明是难以解决的：例如，与经典设置中每个代理都被视为偏差者不同，在这个扩展中，我们证明在没有偏差者阻塞的情况下决定是否存在匹配是 NP 完全的。从积极的一面来看，我们识别了多项式时间和固定参数的易处理情况，为无法完全保证稳定性的多智能体系统提供了新颖的算法。
> **Abstract**: In the fundamental Stable Marriage and Stable Roommates problems, there are inherent trade-offs between the size and stability of solutions. While in the former problem, a stable matching always exists and can be found efficiently using the celebrated Gale-Shapley algorithm, the existence of a stable matching is not guaranteed in the latter problem, but can be determined efficiently using Irving's algorithm. However, the computation of matchings that minimise the instability, either due to the presence of additional constraints on the size of the matching or due to restrictive preference cycles, gives rise to a collection of infamously intractable almost-stable matching problems. In practice, however, not every agent is able or likely to initiate deviations caused by blocking pairs. Suppose we knew, for example, due to a set of requirements or estimates based on historical data, which agents are likely to initiate deviations - the deviators - and which are likely to comply with whatever matching they are presented with - the conformists. Can we decide efficiently whether a matching exists in which no deviator is blocking, i.e., in which no deviator has an incentive to initiate a deviation? Furthermore, can we find matchings in which only a few deviators are blocking? We characterise the computational complexity of this question in bipartite and non-bipartite preference settings. Surprisingly, these problems prove computationally intractable in strong ways: for example, unlike in the classical setting, where every agent is considered a deviator, in this extension, we prove that it is NP-complete to decide whether a matching exists where no deviator is blocking. On the positive side, we identify polynomial-time and fixed-parameter tractable cases, providing novel algorithmics for multi-agent systems where stability cannot be fully guaranteed.

【4】Credit Fairness: Online Fairness In Shared Resource Pools
- **标题**: 信用公平：共享资源池中的在线公平
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17944
> **作者**: Seyed Majid Zahedi,Rupert Freeman
> **摘要**: 我们考虑这样一种设置，其中一组代理共享必须在每个离散时间段内在它们之间分配的资源。代理的需求随时间变化，并从满足其需求的每个资源单位中获得恒定的边际效用，任何额外资源的效用为零。在这种情况下，众所周知，在每一轮中独立最大化最小效用可以满足共享激励（代理人较弱地更愿意参与该机制而不是不参与）、策略证明性（代理人没有动机误报其需求）和帕累托效率（Freeman et al. 2018）。然而，最近的工作（Vuppalapati 等人，2023）表明，这种最大-最小机制可能会导致代理收到的总资源存在巨大差异，即使它们具有相同的平均需求。在本文中，我们引入了信用公平，即加强共享激励，确保在早期轮次借出资源的代理商能够在后续轮次中收回资源。信用公平可以与帕累托效率或策略证明结合起来实现，但不能两者结合。我们提出了一种信用公平且帕累托有效的机制，并在计算资源共享环境中评估其性能。
> **Abstract**: We consider a setting in which a group of agents share resources that must be allocated among them in each discrete time period. Agents have time-varying demands and derive constant marginal utility from each unit of resource received up to their demand, with zero utility for any additional resources. In this setting, it is known that independently maximizing the minimum utility in each round satisfies sharing incentives (agents weakly prefer participating in the mechanism to not participating), strategyproofness (agents have no incentive to misreport their demands), and Pareto efficiency (Freeman et al. 2018). However, recent work (Vuppalapati et al. 2023) has shown that this max-min mechanism can lead to large disparities in the total resources received by agents, even when they have the same average demand. In this paper, we introduce credit fairness, a strengthening of sharing incentives that ensures agents who lend resources in early rounds are able to recoup them in later rounds. Credit fairness can be achieved in conjunction with either Pareto efficiency or strategyproofness, but not both. We propose a mechanism that is credit fair and Pareto efficient, and we evaluate its performance in a computational resource-sharing setting.

## 人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】Putting Privacy to the Test: Introducing Red Teaming for Research Data Anonymization
- **标题**: 测试隐私：引入红队进行研究数据匿名化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19575
> **作者**: Luisa Jansen,Tim Ulmann,Robine Jordi,Malte Elson
> **摘要**: 最近，人机交互等领域研究人员的数据保护实践引起了人们的关注。初步结果表明，研究人员在匿名化方面遇到了困难，部分原因是缺乏明确、可操作的指导。在这项工作中，我们建议使用红队与蓝队的方法来模拟重新识别攻击：一种安全测试中常用的技术，其中一个团队尝试重新识别数据，另一个团队尝试阻止它。我们讨论了将该方法应用于以人为本的隐私的混合方法研究中收集的数据的经验。我们为研究人员提供了在匿名和发布研究数据时应用红队的可用材料。
> **Abstract**: Recently, the data protection practices of researchers in human-computer interaction and elsewhere have gained attention. Initial results suggest that researchers struggle with anonymization, partly due to a lack of clear, actionable guidance. In this work, we propose simulating re-identification attacks using the approach of red teaming versus blue teaming: a technique commonly employed in security testing, where one team tries to re-identify data, and the other team tries to prevent it. We discuss our experience applying this method to data collected in a mixed-methods study in human-centered privacy. We present usable materials for researchers to apply red teaming when anonymizing and publishing their studies' data.

【2】"Do I Trust the AI?" Towards Trustworthy AI-Assisted Diagnosis: Understanding User Perception in LLM-Supported Reasoning
- **标题**: “我相信人工智能吗？”迈向值得信赖的人工智能辅助诊断：了解法学硕士支持的推理中的用户感知
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19540
> **作者**: Yuansong Xu,Yichao Zhu,Haokai Wang,Yuchen Wu,Yang Ouyang,Hanlu Li,Wenzhe Zhou,Xinyu Liu,Chang Jiang,Quan Li
> **摘要**: 大语言模型（LLM）在支持医学诊断方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，它们与临床工作流程的有效整合受到医生难以感知和信任 LLM 能力的阻碍，这通常会导致信任错误。现有的模型评估主要强调标准化基准和预定义任务，对临床推理实践提供的见解有限。此外，关于人类与人工智能协作的研究很少考察医生对法学硕士临床推理能力的看法。在这项工作中，我们研究了医生如何看待法学硕士在临床推理过程中的能力。我们设计了临床病例，收集了相应的分析，并获得了医生（N=37）的评估，以定量地代表他们感知的LLM诊断能力。通过将感知评估与基准表现进行比较，我们的研究强调了医生重视的临床推理方面，并强调了基于基准评估的局限性。我们进一步讨论了在法学硕士支持的临床推理中加强医生和法学硕士之间值得信赖的合作的机会的影响。
> **Abstract**: Large language models (LLMs) have shown considerable potential in supporting medical diagnosis. However, their effective integration into clinical workflows is hindered by physicians' difficulties in perceiving and trusting LLM capabilities, which often results in miscalibrated trust. Existing model evaluations primarily emphasize standardized benchmarks and predefined tasks, offering limited insights into clinical reasoning practices. Moreover, research on human-AI collaboration has rarely examined physicians' perceptions of LLMs' clinical reasoning capability. In this work, we investigate how physicians perceive LLMs' capabilities in the clinical reasoning process. We designed clinical cases, collected the corresponding analyses, and obtained evaluations from physicians (N=37) to quantitatively represent their perceived LLM diagnostic capabilities. By comparing the perceived evaluations with benchmark performance, our study highlights the aspects of clinical reasoning that physicians value and underscores the limitations of benchmark-based evaluation. We further discuss the implications of opportunities for enhancing trustworthy collaboration between physicians and LLMs in LLM-supported clinical reasoning.

【3】VisGuardian: A Lightweight Group-based Privacy Control Technique For Front Camera Data From AR Glasses in Home Environments
- **标题**: VisGuardian：一种基于组的轻量级隐私控制技术，用于家庭环境中 AR 眼镜的前置摄像头数据
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19502
> **作者**: Shuning Zhang,Qucheng Zang,Yongquan `Owen' Hu,Jiachen Du,Xueyang Wang,Yan Kong,Xinyi Fu,Suranga Nanayakkara,Xin Yi,Hewu Li
> **摘要**: AR 眼镜上人工智能应用程序的始终在线感知使得传统的许可技术不适合上下文相关的视觉数据，尤其是在家庭环境中。由于敏感物体的高密度、未经同意的家庭成员的频繁出现以及日常生活的私密性，家庭呈现出极具挑战性的隐私环境，使其成为可扩展隐私控制机制的关键焦点区域。现有的细粒度控件虽然提供了细致入微的选择，但对于管理多个私有对象来说效率低下。我们提出了 VisGuardian，一种用于 AR 眼镜的细粒度的基于内容的视觉许可技术。 VisGuardian具有基于组的控制机制，使用户能够有效地管理多个私有对象的权限。 VisGuardian 使用 YOLO 检测对象并采用预分类模式对它们进行分组。通过选择单个对象，用户可以根据隐私敏感度、对象类别或空间接近度等标准，有效地模糊相关对象组。技术评估显示，VisGuardian 的 mAP50 为 0.6704，延迟仅为 14.0 毫秒，每小时电池消耗增加 1.7%。此外，一项用户研究 (N=24) 将 VisGuardian 与基于滑块和基于对象的基线进行比较，发现它设置权限的速度明显更快，并且因其效率、有效性和易用性而受到用户的青睐。
> **Abstract**: Always-on sensing of AI applications on AR glasses makes traditional permission techniques ill-suited for context-dependent visual data, especially within home environments. The home presents a highly challenging privacy context due to the high density of sensitive objects, and the frequent presence of non-consenting family members, and the intimate nature of daily routines, making it a critical focus area for scalable privacy control mechanisms. Existing fine-grained controls, while offering nuanced choices, are inefficient for managing multiple private objects. We propose VisGuardian, a fine-grained content-based visual permission technique for AR glasses. VisGuardian features a group-based control mechanism that enables users to efficiently manage permissions for multiple private objects. VisGuardian detects objects using YOLO and adopts a pre-classified schema to group them. By selecting a single object, users can efficiently obscure groups of related objects based on criteria including privacy sensitivity, object category, or spatial proximity. A technical evaluation shows VisGuardian achieves mAP50 of 0.6704 with only 14.0 ms latency and a 1.7% increase in battery consumption per hour. Furthermore, a user study (N=24) comparing VisGuardian to slider-based and object-based baselines found it to be significantly faster for setting permissions and was preferred by users for its efficiency, effectiveness, and ease of use.

【4】eHMI for All -- Investigating the Effect of External Communication of Automated Vehicles on Pedestrians, Manual Drivers, and Cyclists in Virtual Reality
- **标题**: 全民 eHMI——在虚拟现实中研究自动驾驶汽车外部通信对行人、手动驾驶员和骑车人的影响
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19440
> **作者**: Mark Colley,Simon Kopp,Debargha Dey,Pascal Jansen,Enrico Rukzio
> **摘要**: 对于自动驾驶车辆 (AV)，如果没有人工操作员，则可能需要外部人机界面 (eHMI) 来与其他道路使用者进行通信。现有的研究主要集中在行人与自动驾驶汽车的交互上，而对其他道路使用者的关注有限，例如骑自行车的人和手动驾驶车辆的驾驶员。到目前为止，还没有研究比较 eHMI 对这三种道路使用者角色的影响。因此，我们进行了一项受试者体内虚拟现实实验 (N=40)，评估 eHMI 在不同程度的分心（无分心、视觉噪音、干扰）下向行人、骑自行车的人和驾驶员传达 AV 意图的主观和客观影响。 eHMI 对所有角色的安全认知、信任、感知有用性和心理需求产生积极影响。虽然分心和道路使用者角色显示出显着的主效应，但交互效应仅在感知可用性中观察到。因此，统一的 eHMI 设计是有效的，有助于 eHMI 在不同流量中的标准化和更广泛的采用。
> **Abstract**: With automated vehicles (AVs), the absence of a human operator could necessitate external Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) to communicate with other road users. Existing research primarily focuses on pedestrian-AV interactions, with limited attention given to other road users, such as cyclists and drivers of manually driven vehicles. So far, no studies have compared the effects of eHMIs across these three road user roles. Therefore, we conducted a within-subjects virtual reality experiment (N=40), evaluating the subjective and objective impact of an eHMI communicating the AV's intention to pedestrians, cyclists, and drivers under various levels of distraction (no distraction, visual noise, interference). eHMIs positively influenced safety perceptions, trust, perceived usefulness, and mental demand across all roles. While distraction and road user roles showed significant main effects, interaction effects were only observed in perceived usability. Thus, a unified eHMI design is effective, facilitating the standardization and broader adoption of eHMIs in diverse traffic.

【5】ProVoice: Designing Proactive Functionality for In-Vehicle Conversational Assistants using Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization to Enhance Driver Experience
- **标题**: ProVoice：使用多目标贝叶斯优化为车载对话助理设计主动功能，以增强驾驶员体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19421
> **作者**: Josh Susak,Yifu Liu,Pascal Jansen,Mark Colley
> **摘要**: 车载对话助理 (IVCA) 的下一步将是在整个旅程中启动和自动化主动系统交互的能力。然而，多样化的驾驶员使得设计针对个人道路期望的语音干预措施变得具有挑战性。本文通过实施 ProVoice：集成 MOBO 的虚拟现实 (VR) 驾驶模拟器来评估人在环 (HITL) 多目标贝叶斯优化 (MOBO) 在设计中的有效性，以研究 IVCA 设计变体对感知心理需求、可预测性和有用性的影响。通过报告受试者内 VR 研究 (N=19) 的帕累托前沿，本文提出了最佳设计权衡。后续分析表明，MOBO 成功地发现了有效的干预策略，减少了参与者的心理需求，同时在参与主动 IVCA 的同时增强了可预测性和有用性。讨论了计算技术对未来主动干预策略研究的影响。 ProVoice 可以扩展到包括替代设计参数和驾驶场景，鼓励大规模的干预设计。
> **Abstract**: The next step for In-vehicle Conversational Assistants (IVCAs) will be their capability to initiate and automate proactive system interactions throughout journeys. However, diverse drivers make it challenging to design voice interventions tailored towards individual on-road expectations. This paper evaluates the effectiveness of Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization (MOBO) in design by implementing ProVoice: a Virtual Reality (VR) driving simulator integrating MOBO to investigate the effects of IVCA design variants on perceived mental demand, predictability, and usefulness. By reporting the Pareto Front from a within-subjects VR study (N=19), this paper proposes optimal design trade-offs. Follow-up analysis demonstrates MOBO's success in discovering effective intervention strategies, with reduced participant mental demand, alongside enhanced predictability and usefulness while engaging with the proactive IVCA. Implications for computational techniques in future research on proactive intervention strategies are discussed. ProVoice can extend to include alternative design parameters and driving scenarios, encouraging intervention design on a broad scale.

【6】MIRAGE: Enabling Real-Time Automotive Mediated Reality
- **标题**: MIRAGE：实现实时汽车介导的现实
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19385
> **作者**: Pascal Jansen,Julian Britten,Mark Colley,Markus Sasalovici,Enrico Rukzio
> **摘要**: 交通本身就很危险，每年约有 119 万人死亡。汽车介导的现实 (AMR) 可以通过在关键对象上叠加关键信息（例如轮廓、图标、文本）以提高意识、改变对象的外观以简化交通情况以及减少其外观以最大程度地减少干扰来增强驾驶安全。然而，由于技术挑战，现实世界的 AMR 评估仍然有限。为了填补模拟与真实之间的差距，我们推出了 MIRAGE，这是一款开源工具，可在真实车辆中实现实时 AMR。 MIRAGE 使用最先进的计算模型进行对象检测和分割、深度估计和修复，在增强、减弱和修改现实的 AMR 范围内实现 15 种效果。在 MIRAGE 的道路专家用户研究 (N=9) 中，参与者享受 AMR 体验，同时指出 AMR 的技术限制并确定 AMR 的用例。我们讨论了与之前的工作相关的这些结果，并概述了对 AMR 伦理和交互设计的影响。
> **Abstract**: Traffic is inherently dangerous, with around 1.19 million fatalities annually. Automotive Mediated Reality (AMR) can enhance driving safety by overlaying critical information (e.g., outlines, icons, text) on key objects to improve awareness, altering objects' appearance to simplify traffic situations, and diminishing their appearance to minimize distractions. However, real-world AMR evaluation remains limited due to technical challenges. To fill this sim-to-real gap, we present MIRAGE, an open-source tool that enables real-time AMR in real vehicles. MIRAGE implements 15 effects across the AMR spectrum of augmented, diminished, and modified reality using state-of-the-art computational models for object detection and segmentation, depth estimation, and inpainting. In an on-road expert user study (N=9) of MIRAGE, participants enjoyed the AMR experience while pointing out technical limitations and identifying use cases for AMR. We discuss these results in relation to prior work and outline implications for AMR ethics and interaction design.

【7】CommSense: Facilitating Bias-Aware and Reflective Navigation of Online Comments for Rational Judgment
- **标题**: CommSense：促进在线评论的偏见意识和反思性导航，以进行理性判断
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19347
> **作者**: Yang Ouyang,Shenghan Gao,Ruichuan Wang,Hailiang Zhu,Yuheng Shao,Xiaoyu Gu,Quan Li
> **摘要**: 在线评论会极大地影响用户的判断，但其呈现方式通常由平台算法决定，可能会引入偏差，例如锚定效应，从而扭曲推理。虽然现有研究强调减轻个人认知偏差，但评论参与过程中用户判断的演变仍然被忽视。本研究调查了演示线索如何影响推理，并探索减轻偏见的界面设计策略。通过初步实验 (N=18) 和协同设计研讨会，我们确定了用户在四个阶段过程中面临的关键挑战，并提炼出四个设计要求：参与前框架、交互式组织、反思提示和综合支持。基于这些见解，我们开发了 CommSense，这是一个即时插件，通过提供视觉概述和轻量级提示来指导推理，从而增强用户对在线评论的参与度。受试者间评估 (N=24) 表明 CommSense 提高了偏见意识和反思性思维，帮助用户产生更全面、基于证据的理由，同时保持高可用性。
> **Abstract**: Online comments significantly influence users' judgments, yet their presentation, often determined by platform algorithms, can introduce biases, such as anchoring effects, which distort reasoning. While existing research emphasizes mitigating individual cognitive biases, the evolution of user judgments during comment engagement remains overlooked. This study investigates how presentation cues impact reasoning and explores interface design strategies to mitigate bias. Through a preliminary experiment (N=18) and a co-design workshop, we identified key challenges users face across a four-stage process and distilled four design requirements: pre-engagement framing, interactive organization, reflective prompts, and synthesis support. Based on these insights, we developed CommSense, an on-the-fly plugin that enhances user engagement with online comments by providing visual overviews and lightweight prompts to guide reasoning. A between-subject evaluation (N=24) demonstrates that CommSense improves bias awareness and reflective thinking, helping users produce more comprehensive, evidence-based rationales while maintaining high usability.

【8】The Psychological Science of Artificial Intelligence: A Rapidly Emerging Field of Psychology
- **标题**: 人工智能的心理科学：一个快速新兴的心理学领域
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19338
> **作者**: Zheng Yan,Ru-Yuan Zhang
> **摘要**: 人工智能（AI）心理科学可以广义地定义为一个新兴的心理学领域，从心理学的角度审视所有与人工智能相关的心理和行为过程。近十年来，这一领域呈指数级增长。本综述综合了人工智能心理科学的现有文献，旨在为规划、开展和评估该领域的科学研究提供全面的概念框架。它由六个部分组成，首先概述人工智能心理科学的整个领域，然后综合四个特定领域的文献（即设计人工智能的心理学、使用人工智能的心理学、检查心理过程的人工智能和推进心理学方法的人工智能），最后对该领域的未来进行展望。
> **Abstract**: The psychological science of artificial intelligence (AI) can be broadly defined as an emerging field of psychology that examines all AI-related mental and behavioral processes from the perspective of psychology. This field has been growing exponentially in the recent decade. This review synthesizes the existing literature on the psychological science of AI with a goal to provide a comprehensive conceptual framework for planning, conducting, and assessing scientific research in the field. It consists of six parts, starting with an overview of the entire field of the psychological science of artificial intelligence, then synthesizing the literature in each of the four specific areas (i.e., Psychology of designing AI, psychology of using AI, AI for examining psychological processes, and AI for advancing psychological methods), and concluding with an outlook on the field in the future.

【9】CaseMaster: Designing and Evaluating a Probe for Oral Case Presentation Training with LLM Assistance
- **标题**: CaseMaster：在法学硕士协助下设计和评估用于口头案例演示培训的探针
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19332
> **作者**: Yang Ouyang,Yuansong Xu,Chang Jiang,Yifan Jin,Haoran Jiang,Quan Li
> **摘要**: 准备口头病例陈述 (OCP) 是医学生的一项关键技能，需要清晰地传达患者信息、临床结果和治疗计划。然而，不一致的学生参与和有限的指导可能使这项任务充满挑战。虽然大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以提供结构化内容来简化流程，但它们在促进技能发展和支持医学教育整合方面的作用仍未得到充分探索。为了解决这个问题，我们与六位医学教育工作者进行了一项形成性研究，并开发了 CaseMaster，这是一种交互式探针，利用法学硕士生成的针对医学教育的内容来帮助用户提高 OCP 技能。对照研究表明，与传统方法相比，CaseMaster 有潜力提高演示质量并减少工作量，专家反馈进一步证实了这一点。我们为教育工作者提出指导方针，以利用法学硕士开发适应性的、以用户为中心的培训方法，同时考虑将先进技术融入医学教育的影响。
> **Abstract**: Preparing an oral case presentation (OCP) is a crucial skill for medical students, requiring clear communication of patient information, clinical findings, and treatment plans. However, inconsistent student participation and limited guidance can make this task challenging. While Large Language Models (LLMs) can provide structured content to streamline the process, their role in facilitating skill development and supporting medical education integration remains underexplored. To address this, we conducted a formative study with six medical educators and developed CaseMaster, an interactive probe that leverages LLM-generated content tailored to medical education to help users enhance their OCP skills. The controlled study suggests CaseMaster has the potential to both improve presentation quality and reduce workload compared to traditional methods, an implication reinforced by expert feedback. We propose guidelines for educators to develop adaptive, user-centered training methods using LLMs, while considering the implications of integrating advanced technologies into medical education.

【10】Voice-Based Chatbots for English Speaking Practice in Multilingual Low-Resource Indian Schools: A Multi-Stakeholder Study
- **标题**: 基于语音的聊天机器人在资源匮乏的印度多语言学校中进行英语口语练习：多利益相关者研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19304
> **作者**: Sneha Shashidhara,Vivienne Bihe Chi,Abhay P Singh,Lyle Ungar,Sharath Chandra Guntuku
> **摘要**: 英语口语水平是低收入印度青年经济流动性的强大推动力，但学校中口语练习的机会仍然很少。我们调查了德里四所资源匮乏的学校部署基于语音的聊天机器人用于英语会话练习的情况。通过为期六天的实地研究，结合观察和访谈，我们了解了学生、教师和校长的观点。调查结果证实了所有群体的高需求，学生的演讲信心显着提高。我们的多利益相关者分析揭示了长期采用愿景中的紧张关系：学生喜欢开放式对话实践，而管理人员则强调与课程相一致的评估。我们为资源匮乏的多语言环境中的语音聊天机器人提供设计建议，强调为非母语学习者提供更易理解的语音输出、与简化界面的一键式交互以及为教育工作者提供可操作分析的需求。除了语言学习之外，我们的研究结果还为未来基于人工智能的教育技术的共同设计提供了信息，这些技术在资源匮乏的学校的复杂生态系统中具有社会可持续性。
> **Abstract**: Spoken English proficiency is a powerful driver of economic mobility for low-income Indian youth, yet opportunities for spoken practice remain scarce in schools. We investigate the deployment of a voice-based chatbot for English conversation practice across four low-resource schools in Delhi. Through a six-day field study combining observations and interviews, we captured the perspectives of students, teachers, and principals. Findings confirm high demand across all groups, with notable gains in student speaking confidence. Our multi-stakeholder analysis surfaced a tension in long-term adoption vision: students favored open-ended conversational practice, while administrators emphasized curriculum-aligned assessment. We offer design recommendations for voice-enabled chatbots in low-resource multilingual contexts, highlighting the need for more intelligible speech output for non-native learners, one-tap interactions with simplified interfaces, and actionable analytics for educators. Beyond language learning, our findings inform the co-design of future AI-based educational technologies that are socially sustainable within the complex ecosystem of low-resource schools.

【11】A Collaborative Extended Reality Prototype for 3D Surgical Planning and Visualization
- **标题**: 用于 3D 手术规划和可视化的协作扩展现实原型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19303
> **作者**: Shi Qiu,Ruiyang Li,Qixuan Liu,Yuqi Tong,Yue Qiu,Yinqiao Wang,Yan Li,Chi-Wing Fu,Pheng-Ann Heng
> **摘要**: 我们提出了一个用于 3D 手术规划和可视化的协作扩展现实 (XR) 原型。我们的系统由三个关键模块组成：基于 XR 的沉浸式手术规划、基于云的数据管理以及用于交互式可视化的协调立体 3D 显示。我们描述了整体工作流程、核心功能、实现和设置。通过对肝切除手术计划案例进行用户研究，我们展示了原型的有效性，并提供了实用的见解，以激发医学 XR 合作的未来进步。
> **Abstract**: We present a collaborative extended reality (XR) prototype for 3D surgical planning and visualization. Our system consists of three key modules: XR-based immersive surgical planning, cloud-based data management, and coordinated stereoscopic 3D displays for interactive visualization. We describe the overall workflow, core functionalities, implementations and setups. By conducting user studies on a liver resection surgical planning case, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our prototype and provide practical insights to inspire future advances in medical XR collaboration.

【12】Gazeify Then Voiceify: Physical Object Referencing Through Gaze and Voice Interaction with Displayless Smart Glasses
- **标题**: Gazeify 然后 Voiceify：通过无显示智能眼镜的凝视和语音交互来参考物理对象
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19281
> **作者**: Zheng Zhang,Mengjie Yu,Tianyi Wang,Kashyap Todi,Ajoy Savio Fernandes,Yue Liu,Haijun Xia,Tovi Grossman,Tanya Jonker
> **摘要**: 智能眼镜通过使用头戴式摄像头观察用户的视角来增强与环境的交互，但缺乏用于常见交互的视觉反馈。我们先介绍了 Gazeify，然后介绍了 Voiceify，这是一种多模式方法，允许使用无显示智能眼镜通过凝视和语音来选择对象。用户可以用目光选择一个物理对象，系统会生成一个数字掩模和该对象语义的语音描述。用户可以通过自由形式的对话进一步纠正错误。为了演示我们的方法，我们通过将高级对象分割和检测与视觉语言模型集成来开发一个交互式系统。用户研究表明，参与者在 53% 的任务试验中实现了正确的注视选择，并使用语音消歧纠正了 58% 的剩余错误。参与者还认为该系统可爱、有用且易于使用。
> **Abstract**: Smart glasses enhance interactions with the environment by using head-mounted cameras to observe the user's viewpoint, but lack the visual feedback used for common interactions. We introduce Gazeify then Voiceify, a multimodal approach allowing object selection via gaze and voice using displayless smart glasses. Users can select a physical object with their gaze, and the system generates a digital mask and a voice description of the object's semantics. Users can further correct errors through free-form conversation. To demonstrate our approach, we develop an interactive system by integrating advanced object segmentation and detection with a vision-language model. User studies reveal that participants achieve correct gaze selection in 53% of the task trials and use voice disambiguation to correct 58% of the remaining errors. Participants also rated the system as likable, useful, and easy to use.

【13】A Personalized and Adaptable User Interface for a Speech and Cursor Brain-Computer Interface
- **标题**: 用于语音和光标脑机接口的个性化且适应性强的用户界面
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19269
> **作者**: Hamza Peracha,Carrina Iacobacci,Tyler Singer-Clark,Leigh R. Hochberg,Sergey D. Stavisky,David M. Brandman,Nicholas S. Card
> **摘要**: 通信和计算机交互对于现代生活的自主性非常重要。不幸的是，对于数百万瘫痪患者来说，这些能力可能有限或无法获得。虽然植入式脑机接口 (BCI) 有望恢复这些功能，但在设计供日常持续使用的 BCI 用户界面 (UI) 方面却鲜有探索。在这里，我们为皮质内 BCI 系统提供了一个个性化的 UI，使严重瘫痪的用户能够独立地与计算机进行通信和交互。通过与一名参与者进行为期 22 个月的纵向部署，我们使用迭代协同设计开发了一个供日常家庭使用的系统，并记录了它如何演变以满足不断变化的需求。我们的研究结果强调了个性化和适应性如何实现日常生活中的独立性，并为开发未来 BCI 辅助技术提供了设计启示。
> **Abstract**: Communication and computer interaction are important for autonomy in modern life. Unfortunately, these capabilities can be limited or inaccessible for the millions of people living with paralysis. While implantable brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) show promise for restoring these capabilities, little has been explored on designing BCI user interfaces (UIs) for sustained daily use. Here, we present a personalized UI for an intracortical BCI system that enables users with severe paralysis to communicate and interact with their computers independently. Through a 22-month longitudinal deployment with one participant, we used iterative co-design to develop a system for everyday at-home use and documented how it evolved to meet changing needs. Our findings highlight how personalization and adaptability enabled independence in daily life and provide design implications for developing future BCI assistive technologies.

【14】GhostUI: Unveiling Hidden Interactions in Mobile UI
- **标题**: GhostUI：揭示移动用户界面中隐藏的交互
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19258
> **作者**: Minkyu Kweon,Seokhyeon Park,Soohyun Lee,You Been Lee,Jeongmin Rhee,Jinwook Seo
> **摘要**: 现代移动应用程序依靠隐藏的交互（没有视觉提示的手势，如长按和滑动）来提供功能而不使界面混乱。虽然有经验的用户可能会通过之前的使用或入门教程发现这些交互，但它们的隐含性质使大多数用户难以发现。同样，移动代理（旨在在移动用户界面上自动执行任务的系统，由视​​觉语言模型 (VLM) 提供支持）很难检测隐藏的交互或确定完成任务的操作。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 GhostUI，这是一个新的数据集，旨在检测移动应用程序中隐藏的交互。 GhostUI 提供前后屏幕截图、简化的视图层次结构、手势元数据和任务描述，使 VLM 能够更好地识别隐藏的手势并预测交互后状态。 VLM 的定量评估表明，在 GhostUI 上微调的模型优于基线 VLM，特别是在预测隐藏交互和推断交互后屏幕方面，强调了 GhostUI 作为推进移动任务自动化基础的潜力。
> **Abstract**: Modern mobile applications rely on hidden interactions--gestures without visual cues like long presses and swipes--to provide functionality without cluttering interfaces. While experienced users may discover these interactions through prior use or onboarding tutorials, their implicit nature makes them difficult for most users to uncover. Similarly, mobile agents--systems designed to automate tasks on mobile user interfaces, powered by vision language models (VLMs)--struggle to detect veiled interactions or determine actions for completing tasks. To address this challenge, we present GhostUI, a new dataset designed to enable the detection of hidden interactions in mobile applications. GhostUI provides before-and-after screenshots, simplified view hierarchies, gesture metadata, and task descriptions, allowing VLMs to better recognize concealed gestures and anticipate post-interaction states. Quantitative evaluations with VLMs show that models fine-tuned on GhostUI outperform baseline VLMs, particularly in predicting hidden interactions and inferring post-interaction screens, underscoring GhostUI's potential as a foundation for advancing mobile task automation.

【15】Automatic Synthesis of Visualization Design Knowledge Bases
- **标题**: 可视化设计知识库自动合成
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19237
> **作者**: Hyeok Kim,Sehi L'Yi,Nils Gehlenborg,Jeffrey Heer
> **摘要**: 可视化设计空间的形式表示（例如知识库和图表）将设计实践整合到共享资源中，并实现自动推理和可解释的设计建议。然而，现有的方法通常依赖于固定的、手动编写的规则，这使得构建新颖的表示或将其扩展到不同的可视化领域变得困难。相反，我们提出了自动合成可视化设计知识库的数据驱动方法。具体来说，我们的方法（1）从可视化语料库中提取候选设计特征，（2）向前和向后选择特征，以及（3）渲染最终的知识库。在我们的基准评估中，与 Draco 2 相比，我们的综合知识库提供了通用且可解释的设计特征，并将在各种训练和测试集中预测有效设计的准确性提高了 1-15%。当我们将我们的方法应用于基因组学可视化时，合成的知识库包含准确度高达 97% 的合理特征，这证明了我们的方法对其他可视化领域的适用性。
> **Abstract**: Formal representations of the visualization design space, such as knowledge bases and graphs, consolidate design practices into a shared resource and enable automated reasoning and interpretable design recommendations. However, prior approaches typically depend on fixed, manually authored rules, making it difficult to build novel representations or extend them for different visualization domains. Instead, we propose data-driven methods that automatically synthesize visualization design knowledge bases. Specifically, our methods (1) extract candidate design features from a visualization corpus, (2) select features forward and backward, and (3) render the final knowledge base. In our benchmark evaluation compared to Draco 2, our synthesized knowledge base offers general and interpretable design features and improves the accuracy of predicting effective designs by 1-15% in varied training and test sets. When we apply our approach to genomics visualization, the synthesized knowledge base includes sensible features with accuracy up to 97%, demonstrating the applicability of our approach to other visualization domains.

【16】Before Smelling the Video: A Two-Stage Pipeline for Interpretable Video-to-Scent Plans
- **标题**: 在闻视频之前：可解释的视频到气味计划的两阶段管道
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19203
> **作者**: Kaicheng Wang,Kevin Zhongyang Shao,Ruiqi Chen,Sep Makhsous,Denise Wilson
> **摘要**: 嗅觉线索可以增强交互式媒体的沉浸感，但气味仍然很少见，因为很难创作动态视频并与动态视频同步。先前的嗅觉界面依赖于设计器触发器和固定的事件到气味映射，这些映射无法扩展到不受约束的内容。这项工作研究了在物理气味传递之前人们是否可以理解气味的语义规划。我们提出了一种视频到气味的规划流程，它将使用视觉语言模型的视觉语义提取与使用大型语言模型的语义到嗅觉推理分开。两项调查研究将系统生成的气味计划与过度包容和幼稚的基线进行了比较。结果显示，人们一致偏好优先考虑感知显着线索并将气味变化与可见动作相结合的计划，支持语义规划作为未来嗅觉媒体系统的基础。
> **Abstract**: Olfactory cues can enhance immersion in interactive media, yet smell remains rare because it is difficult to author and synchronize with dynamic video. Prior olfactory interfaces rely on designer triggers and fixed event-to-odor mappings that do not scale to unconstrained content. This work examines whether semantic planning for smell is intelligible to people before physical scent delivery. We present a video-to-scent planning pipeline that separates visual semantic extraction using a vision-language model from semantic-to-olfactory inference using a large language model. Two survey studies compare system-generated scent plans with over-inclusive and naive baselines. Results show consistent preference for plans that prioritize perceptually salient cues and align scent changes with visible actions, supporting semantic planning as a foundation for future olfactory media systems.

【17】Bridging Gulfs in UI Generation through Semantic Guidance
- **标题**: 通过语义指导弥合 UI 生成中的鸿沟
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19171
> **作者**: Seokhyeon Park,Soohyun Lee,Eugene Choi,Hyunwoo Kim,Minkyu Kweon,Yumin Song,Jinwook Seo
> **摘要**: 虽然生成式人工智能可以根据文本提示生成高保真用户界面，但用户很难阐明设计意图并评估或完善结果，从而在执行和评估方面产生鸿沟。为了了解 UI 生成所需的信息，我们对 UI 提示指南进行了主题分析，识别了关键的设计语义并发现它们是分层且相互依赖的。利用这些发现，我们开发了一个系统，使用户能够指定语义、可视化关系，并提取语义在生成的 UI 中的反映方式。通过使语义充当人类意图和人工智能输出之间的中间表示，我们的系统通过使需求明确和结果可解释来弥合这两道鸿沟。一项比较用户研究表明，我们的方法增强了用户对意图表达、结果解释的感知控制，并促进更可预测的迭代细化。我们的工作展示了显式语义表示如何在人工智能驱动的 UI 设计中系统地、可解释地探索设计可能性。
> **Abstract**: While generative AI enables high-fidelity UI generation from text prompts, users struggle to articulate design intent and evaluate or refine results-creating gulfs of execution and evaluation. To understand the information needed for UI generation, we conducted a thematic analysis of UI prompting guidelines, identifying key design semantics and discovering that they are hierarchical and interdependent. Leveraging these findings, we developed a system that enables users to specify semantics, visualize relationships, and extract how semantics are reflected in generated UIs. By making semantics serve as an intermediate representation between human intent and AI output, our system bridges both gulfs by making requirements explicit and outcomes interpretable. A comparative user study suggests that our approach enhances users' perceived control over intent expression, outcome interpretation, and facilitates more predictable, iterative refinement. Our work demonstrates how explicit semantic representation enables systematic and explainable exploration of design possibilities in AI-driven UI design.

【18】Nonvisual Support for Understanding and Reasoning about Data Structures
- **标题**: 对数据结构理解和推理的非视觉支持
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19168
> **作者**: Brianna L. Wimer,Ritesh Kanchi,Kaija Frierson,Venkatesh Potluri,Ronald Metoyer,Jennifer Mankoff,Miya Natsuhara,Matt X. Wang
> **摘要**: 盲人和视障 (BVI) 计算机科学专业的学生在学习数据结构时面临系统性障碍：当前的可访问性方法通常将图表转换为替代文本，重点关注视觉外观，而不是保留概念理解所必需的底层结构。更容易获得的替代方案通常不会在复杂性、生产成本或两者上扩展。在最近转向从代码创建可视化图表的工具的推动下，我们提出了一种解决方案，可以根据图表的结构信息自动创建可访问的表示。基于绿野仙踪研究，我们得出了自动化系统 Arboretum 的设计要求，该系统将基于文本的图表规范编译为三种同步的非视觉格式$\unicode{x2013}$表格、可导航和触觉。我们对英属维尔京群岛用户的评估强调了触觉图形在二分搜索等复杂任务中的优势；提供多种互补的非视觉表示的好处；以及现有数字导航模式在结构推理方面的局限性。这项工作通过保留数据结构的结构属性来重新构建对数据结构的访问。该解决方案是一个推进无障碍计算机科学教育的实用系统。
> **Abstract**: Blind and visually impaired (BVI) computer science students face systematic barriers when learning data structures: current accessibility approaches typically translate diagrams into alternative text, focusing on visual appearance rather than preserving the underlying structure essential for conceptual understanding. More accessible alternatives often do not scale in complexity, cost to produce, or both. Motivated by a recent shift to tools for creating visual diagrams from code, we propose a solution that automatically creates accessible representations from structural information about diagrams. Based on a Wizard-of-Oz study, we derive design requirements for an automated system, Arboretum, that compiles text-based diagram specifications into three synchronized nonvisual formats$\unicode{x2013}$tabular, navigable, and tactile. Our evaluation with BVI users highlights the strength of tactile graphics for complex tasks such as binary search; the benefits of offering multiple, complementary nonvisual representations; and limitations of existing digital navigation patterns for structural reasoning. This work reframes access to data structures by preserving their structural properties. The solution is a practical system to advance accessible CS education.

【19】Grand Challenges around Designing Computers' Control Over Our Bodies
- **标题**: 设计计算机控制我们身体的巨大挑战
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19143
> **作者**: Florian 'Floyd' Mueller,Nadia Bianchi-Berthouze,Misha Sra,Mar Gonzalez-Franco,Henning Pohl,Susanne Boll,Richard Byrne,Arthur Caetano,Masahiko Inami,Jarrod Knibbe,Per Ola Kristensson,Xiang Li,Zhuying Li,Joe Marshall,Louise Petersen Matjeka,Minna Nygren,Rakesh Patibanda,Sara Price,Harald Reiterer,Aryan Saini,Oliver Schneider,Ambika Shahu,Jürgen Steimle,Phoebe O. Toups Dugas,Don Samitha Elvitigala
> **摘要**: 新兴技术的进步，例如体内机械执行器和肌肉电刺激，使计算机能够控制我们的身体。这既带来了机遇，也带来了挑战，提出了有关代理以及我们身体在与技术互动时所扮演的角色的基本问题。为了推动整个研究领域的发展，我们在为期一周的研讨会上汇集了专家的观点，阐明了在设计计算机控制我们身体时应解决的重大挑战。这些巨大挑战涵盖技术、设计、用户和道德方面。通过阐明这些重大挑战，我们的目标是开始启动一项研究议程，将身体控制不仅定位为技术特征，而且定位为未来人机交互努力的核心、体验和伦理问题。
> **Abstract**: Advances in emerging technologies, such as on-body mechanical actuators and electrical muscle stimulation, have allowed computers to take control over our bodies. This presents opportunities as well as challenges, raising fundamental questions about agency and the role of our bodies when interacting with technology. To advance this research field as a whole, we brought together expert perspectives in a week-long seminar to articulate the grand challenges that should be tackled when it comes to the design of computers' control over our bodies. These grand challenges span technical, design, user, and ethical aspects. By articulating these grand challenges, we aim to begin initiating a research agenda that positions bodily control not only as a technical feature but as a central, experiential, and ethical concern for future human-computer interaction endeavors.

【20】From Answer Givers to Design Mentors: Guiding LLMs with the Cognitive Apprenticeship Model
- **标题**: 从答案提供者到设计导师：用认知学徒模式指导法学硕士
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19053
> **作者**: Yongsu Ahn,Lejun R Liao,Benjamin Bach,Nam Wook Kim
> **摘要**: 设计反馈可以帮助从业者改进他们的作品，同时也促进反思和设计推理。 ChatGPT 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以支持设计工作，但通常会提供通用的一次性建议，从而限制反思性参与。我们研究如何通过应用认知学徒模型来指导法学硕士充当设计导师，该模型强调通过六种方法展示推理：建模、辅导、脚手架、清晰表达、反思和探索。我们通过结构化提示来实施这些教学方法，并在与数据可视化从业者的受试者内研究中对其进行评估。参与者与基线法学硕士和带有认知学徒提示的指导性法学硕士进行了互动。调查、访谈和对话日志分析比较了不同条件下的体验。我们的研究结果表明，认知提示会引发更深入的设计推理和更具反思性的反馈交换，尽管有时根据任务类型或经验水平首选基线。我们提炼出人工智能辅助反馈系统的设计考虑因素，以促进反思性实践。
> **Abstract**: Design feedback helps practitioners improve their artifacts while also fostering reflection and design reasoning. Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT can support design work, but often provide generic, one-off suggestions that limit reflective engagement. We investigate how to guide LLMs to act as design mentors by applying the Cognitive Apprenticeship Model, which emphasizes demonstrating reasoning through six methods: modeling, coaching, scaffolding, articulation, reflection, and exploration. We operationalize these instructional methods through structured prompting and evaluate them in a within-subjects study with data visualization practitioners. Participants interacted with both a baseline LLM and an instructional LLM designed with cognitive apprenticeship prompts. Surveys, interviews, and conversational log analyses compared experiences across conditions. Our findings show that cognitively informed prompts elicit deeper design reasoning and more reflective feedback exchanges, though the baseline is sometimes preferred depending on task types or experience levels. We distill design considerations for AI-assisted feedback systems that foster reflective practice.

【21】Listening before Asking: Lived-Experience Advisors as Methodological Partners in Dementia Caregiving Studies
- **标题**: 先听后问：生活经验顾问作为痴呆症护理研究的方法论伙伴
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19021
> **作者**: Joy Lai,Kelly Beaton,David Black,Alex Mihailidis
> **摘要**: 对痴呆症护理人员的研究提出了持续的方法论和伦理挑战，特别是当基于访谈的研究的设计没有充分立足于生活护理现实时。通过临床或以赤字为导向的假设提出的问题可能会疏远参与者、破坏融洽关系并产生肤浅或道德问题的数据。虽然人机交互（HCI）研究越来越多地在技术设计中采用参与式方法，但参与很少延伸到研究方法本身的设计。本文探讨了生活体验顾问作为护理人员访谈研究中的方法伙伴的作用。我们报告了一项定性研究，其中两名具有丰富痴呆症护理经验的顾问在实地工作之前作为方法伙伴参与其中，将参与原则从技术设计扩展到研究方法本身的设计。根据顾问咨询的记录以及随后对十名护理人员和一名痴呆症患者的采访，我们确定了顾问参与的两个关键方法论贡献。首先，顾问通过在护理人员访谈中提出护理挑战、道德敏感性和解释性问题来实现预期有效性，从而使研究人员能够在有限的招募和实地工作条件下以扎根的意识进入该领域。其次，顾问提供文化、情感和系统背景，提高解释敏感性并有助于避免误读。我们认为，生活体验起到了方法论基础设施的作用，将参与原则延伸到研究本身的设计和实施中，并构成了针对护理人员和其他弱势或边缘群体的人机交互研究的通用方法论模式。
> **Abstract**: Research with dementia caregivers poses persistent methodological and ethical challenges, particularly when interview-based studies are designed without sufficient grounding in lived caregiving realities. Questions framed through clinical or deficit-oriented assumptions risk alienating participants, undermining rapport, and producing shallow or ethically fraught data. While human-computer interaction (HCI) research increasingly adopts participatory approaches in technology design, participation rarely extends to the design of research methods themselves. This paper examines the role of lived-experience advisors as methodological partners in caregiver interview research. We report on a qualitative study in which two advisors with extensive dementia caregiving experience were engaged prior to fieldwork as methodological partners, extending participatory principles beyond technology design into the design of research methods themselves. Drawing on transcripts of advisor consultations and subsequent interviews with ten caregivers and one person living with dementia, we identify two key methodological contributions of advisor involvement. First, advisors enabled anticipatory validity by surfacing caregiving challenges, ethical sensitivities, and interpretive concerns that later appeared in caregiver interviews, allowing the researcher to enter the field with grounded awareness under constrained recruitment and fieldwork conditions. Second, advisors provided cultural, emotional, and systemic context that improved interpretive sensitivity and helped avoid misreadings. We argue that lived experience functions as methodological infrastructure, extending participatory principles into the design and conduct of research itself, and constituting a generalizable methodological pattern for HCI research with caregivers and other vulnerable or marginalized populations.

【22】XR Design Framework for Early Childhood Education
- **标题**: 幼儿教育XR设计框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18979
> **作者**: Supriya Khadka,Sanchari Das
> **摘要**: 由于儿童的快速发展变化，幼儿教育中的扩展现实提出了高风险挑战。虽然增强现实和虚拟现实提供了身临其境的教学优势，但它们通常会带来过多的认知负担或感官冲突。我们引入了增强人类发展（AHD）框架，通过认知、感觉、环境和发育参数对这些相互作用进行建模。为了奠定这一框架，我们对 111 项涉及 3 - 8 岁儿童的同行评审研究进行了知识系统化 (SoK)。通过 AHD 视角解释的我们的研究结果揭示了一个关键的“风险与注意力差距”，即与短期教学成果相比，高影响力的安全风险仍然没有得到充分研究。
> **Abstract**: Extended Reality in early childhood education presents high-risk challenges due to children's rapid developmental changes. While augmented and virtual reality offer immersive pedagogical benefits, they often impose excessive cognitive load or sensory conflict. We introduce the Augmented Human Development (AHD) framework to model these interactions through cognitive, sensory, environmental, and developmental parameters. To ground this framework, we conducted a Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) of 111 peer-reviewed studies involving children aged 3 - 8. Our findings, interpreted through the AHD lens, reveal a critical "risk vs. attention gap," where high-impact safety and security risks remain under-researched compared to short-term pedagogical gains.

【23】HumanoidTurk: Expanding VR Haptics with Humanoids for Driving Simulations
- **标题**: HumanoidTurk：利用 Humanoids 扩展 VR 触觉以进行驾驶模拟
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18975
> **作者**: DaeHo Lee,Ryo Suzuki,Jin-Hyuk Hong
> **摘要**: 我们探索人形机器人如何重新用作触觉媒体，超越其作为社交、辅助、协作代理的传统角色。为了说明这种方法，我们实施了 HumanoidTurk，向基于人形的触觉系统迈出了第一步，该系统将游戏中的重力信号转换为 VR 驾驶中的同步运动反馈。一项涉及六名参与者的试点研究比较了两种合成方法，促使我们采用基于过滤器的方法来获得更平滑、更真实的反馈。随后的一项针对 16 名参与者的研究评估了四种情况：无反馈、控制器、人形+控制器和人类+控制器。结果表明，人形反馈增强了沉浸感、真实感和乐趣，同时在舒适度和模拟晕眩感方面引入了适度的成本。采访进一步强调了与人类反馈的适应性相比，机器人的一致性和可预测性。根据这些发现，我们将保真度、适应性和多功能性确定为新兴主题，将人形机器人定位为沉浸式 VR 的独特触觉模式。
> **Abstract**: We explore how humanoid robots can be repurposed as haptic media, extending beyond their conventional role as social, assistive, collaborative agents. To illustrate this approach, we implemented HumanoidTurk, taking a first step toward a humanoid-based haptic system that translates in-game g-force signals into synchronized motion feedback in VR driving. A pilot study involving six participants compared two synthesis methods, leading us to adopt a filter-based approach for smoother and more realistic feedback. A subsequent study with sixteen participants evaluated four conditions: no-feedback, controller, humanoid+controller, and human+controller. Results showed that humanoid feedback enhanced immersion, realism, and enjoyment, while introducing moderate costs in terms of comfort and simulation sickness. Interviews further highlighted the robot's consistency and predictability in contrast to the adaptability of human feedback. From these findings, we identify fidelity, adaptability, and versatility as emerging themes, positioning humanoids as a distinct haptic modality for immersive VR.

【24】People Can Accurately Predict Behavior of Complex Algorithms That Are Available, Compact, and Aligned
- **标题**: 人们可以准确预测可用、紧凑且一致的复杂算法的行为
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18966
> **作者**: Lindsay Popowski,Helena Vasconcelos,Ignacio Javier Fernandez,Chijioke Chinaza Mgbahurike,Ralf Herbrich,Jeffrey Hancock,Michael S. Bernstein
> **摘要**: 当用户能够预测算法的行为时，他们会更加信任算法。简单的算法很容易产生预测准确的心理模型，但现代人工智能算法通常被认为过于复杂，以至于人们无法构建预测心理模型，尤其是在社交媒体领域。在本文中，我们描述了即使是复杂的算法也可以产生预测心理模型的条件，为更广泛的以人为中心的算法提供了机会。我们推测，当且仅当算法同时满足三个标准时，用户才会形成算法行为的准确预测心理模型：（1）所建模的基本概念的认知可用性，（2）概念紧凑性（它是否形成单一认知结构？），以及（3）人与算法执行概念之间的高度一致性。我们通过预先注册的实验 (N=1250) 评估这一理论，其中用户预测 25 种社交媒体提要排名算法的行为，这些算法根据这些标准而变化。我们发现，即使是复杂的（例如基于 LLM 的）算法在满足所有标准时也能获得准确的预测率，而即使是简单的（例如基本术语计数）算法在单个标准失败时也无法预测。我们还发现，这些标准决定的结果超出了预测准确性，例如用户使用哪些心理模型来进行预测。
> **Abstract**: Users trust algorithms more when they can predict the algorithms' behavior. Simple algorithms trivially yield predictively accurate mental models, but modern AI algorithms have often been assumed too complex for people to build predictive mental models, especially in the social media domain. In this paper, we describe conditions under which even complex algorithms can yield predictive mental models, opening up opportunities for a broader set of human-centered algorithms. We theorize that users will form an accurate predictive mental model of an algorithm's behavior if and only if the algorithm simultaneously satisfies three criteria: (1) cognitive availability of the underlying concepts being modeled, (2) concept compactness (does it form a single cognitive construct?), and (3) high alignment between the person's and algorithm's execution of the concept. We evaluate this theory through a pre-registered experiment (N=1250) where users predict behavior of 25 social media feed ranking algorithms that vary on these criteria. We find that even complex (e.g., LLM-based) algorithms enjoy accurate prediction rates when they meet all criteria, and even simple (e.g., basic term count) algorithms fail to be predictable when a single criterion fails. We also find that these criteria determine outcomes beyond prediction accuracy, such as which mental models users deploy to make their predictions.

【25】Whispering Water: Materializing Human-AI Dialogue as Interactive Ripples
- **标题**: 水语：将人机对话具体化为互动涟漪
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18934
> **作者**: Ruipeng Wang,Tawab Safi,Yunge Wen,Christina Cunningham,Hoi Ling Tang,Behnaz Farahi
> **摘要**: 在不同的文化中，水一直是人类忏悔的接受者，是一种屈服的媒介，可以承受刚性表面所无法承受的脆弱性。我们展示了 Whispering Water，这是一个交互式装置，通过水上的循环模式实现了人类与人工智能的对话。参与者向水面坦白秘密，引发四个阶段的仪式：坦白、沉思、回应和释放。用户的语音情感直接传输到水中以启动其状态，而语义内容进入多代理系统，引发对话的涟漪，其中代理身份通过话语定位，并根据他们所说的内容选择语音配置文件。我们提出了一种新颖的算法，可将语音分解为分量波并在水中重建它们，从而建立语音与物质形态物理之间的转换。通过将机器推理呈现为自然出现的物理现象，该装置通过模糊的、感官丰富的界面探索情感自我探索的可能性。
> **Abstract**: Across cultures, water has served as a recipient of human confession, a yielding medium that receives vulnerability where rigid surfaces cannot. We present Whispering Water, an interactive installation that materializes human-AI dialogue through cymatic patterns on water. Participants confess secrets to a water surface, triggering a four-phase ritual: confession, contemplation, response, and release. The user's speech sentiment is directly transmitted into the water to prime its state, while semantic content enters a multi-agent system, initiating ripples of conversation where agent identities are situated through discourse and voice profiles are chosen based on what they say. We propose a novel algorithm that decomposes speech into component waves and reconstructs them in water, establishing a translation between speech and the physics of material form. By rendering machine reasoning as emergent physical phenomena, the installation explores possibilities for emotional self-exploration through ambiguous, sensory-rich interfaces.

【26】MEGnifying Emotion: Sentiment Analysis from Annotated Brain Data
- **标题**: MEGnifying 情感：来自带注释的大脑数据的情感分析
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18792
> **作者**: Brian Liu,Oiwi Parker Jones
> **摘要**: 从大脑活动中解码情绪可以加深对人类经历的理解。虽然许多现有数据集将大脑数据与语音和语音转录本对齐，但没有数据集用情感注释大脑数据。为了弥补这一差距，我们探索使用预先训练的文本到情感模型来注释非侵入性大脑录音，这些录音是在参与者听有声读物时使用脑磁图 (MEG) 获得的。对文本进行注释后，我们使用文本和音频的强制对齐来将我们的情感标签与大脑录音对齐。然后，根据这些数据训练 Brainto-Sentiment 模型就很简单了。实验结果表明，与基线相比，大脑到情感的平衡准确性有所提高，支持所提出的方法作为利用现有 MEG 数据集和学习直接从大脑解码情感的概念验证。
> **Abstract**: Decoding emotion from brain activity could unlock a deeper understanding of the human experience. While a number of existing datasets align brain data with speech and with speech transcripts, no datasets have annotated brain data with sentiment. To bridge this gap, we explore the use of pre-trained Text-to-Sentiment models to annotate non invasive brain recordings, acquired using magnetoencephalography (MEG), while participants listened to audiobooks. Having annotated the text, we employ force-alignment of the text and audio to align our sentiment labels with the brain recordings. It is straightforward then to train Brainto-Sentiment models on these data. Experimental results show an improvement in balanced accuracy for Brain-to-Sentiment compared to baseline, supporting the proposed approach as a proof-of-concept for leveraging existing MEG datasets and learning to decode sentiment directly from the brain.

【27】Design Techniques for LLM-Powered Interactive Storytelling: A Case Study of the Dramamancer System
- **标题**: 法学硕士支持的互动故事设计技术：戏剧演员系统案例研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18785
> **作者**: Tiffany Wang,Yuqian Sun,Yi Wang,Melissa Roemmele,John Joon Young Chung,Max Kreminski
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的兴起为在互动叙事中连接作者意图和玩家代理提供了一种新范式。我们通过 Dramamancer 的例子来考虑这种范例，该系统使用法学硕士将作者创建的故事模式转换为玩家驱动的游戏。该扩展摘要概述了与该系统相关的一些设计技术和评估注意事项。
> **Abstract**: The rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) has enabled a new paradigm for bridging authorial intent and player agency in interactive narrative. We consider this paradigm through the example of Dramamancer, a system that uses an LLM to transform author-created story schemas into player-driven playthroughs. This extended abstract outlines some design techniques and evaluation considerations associated with this system.

【28】Are Conversational AI Agents the Way Out? Co-Designing Reader-Oriented News Experiences with Immigrants and Journalists
- **标题**: 对话式人工智能代理是出路吗？与移民和记者共同设计面向读者的新闻体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18772
> **作者**: Yongle Zhang,Ge Gao
> **摘要**: 最近新闻业、人机交互和以人为中心的计算交叉领域的讨论提出了技术如何帮助创造以读者为导向的新闻体验的问题。本论文通过关注移民读者来开展这一举措，该群体报告说在参与主流新闻方面存在很大困难，但在之前的研究中受到的关注有限。我们报告了与居住在美国的 11 名移民读者和在同一地区工作的 7 名记者共同设计的研究结果，旨在增强前者的新闻体验。从所有参与者收集的数据揭示了一个“未解决或无法解释”的悖论，挑战了移民读者和记者的价值观一致性。这个悖论指向了关于如何设计对话式人工智能代理来协助新闻阅读的四个隐喻。每个隐喻都需要对话式人工智能、记者和移民读者以不同的方式协调他们共同的责任。这些发现为人工智能在循环中以读者为导向的新闻体验提供了见解。
> **Abstract**: Recent discussions at the intersection of journalism, HCI, and human-centered computing ask how technologies can help create reader-oriented news experiences. The current paper takes up this initiative by focusing on immigrant readers, a group who reports significant difficulties engaging with mainstream news yet has received limited attention in prior research. We report findings from our co-design research with eleven immigrant readers living in the United States and seven journalists working in the same region, aiming to enhance the news experience of the former. Data collected from all participants revealed an "unaddressed-or-unaccountable" paradox that challenges value alignment across immigrant readers and journalists. This paradox points to four metaphors regarding how conversational AI agents can be designed to assist news reading. Each metaphor requires conversational AI, journalists, and immigrant readers to coordinate their shared responsibilities in a distinct manner. These findings provide insights into reader-oriented news experiences with AI in the loop.

【29】UI Remix: Supporting UI Design Through Interactive Example Retrieval and Remixing
- **标题**: UI Remix：通过交互式示例检索和重新混合支持 UI 设计
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18759
> **作者**: Junling Wang,Hongyi Lan,Xiaotian Su,Mustafa Doga Dogan,April Yi Wang
> **摘要**: 设计用户界面 (UI) 是推出产品、构建产品组合或个性化项目时的关键步骤，但没有设计专业知识的最终用户往往难以阐明其意图并难以信任设计选择。现有的基于示例的工具要么促进广泛的探索，这可能会导致不知所措和设计漂移，要么需要调整单个示例，从而面临设计固定的风险。我们推出了 UI Remix，这是一个交互式系统，通过示例驱动的设计工作流程支持移动 UI 设计。在多模式检索增强生成 (MMRAG) 模型的支持下，UI Remix 可以在全局（整个界面）和本地（组件）级别上迭代搜索、选择和调整示例。为了培养信任，它提供了源透明度线索，例如评级、下载计数和开发者信息。在一项针对 24 位最终用户的实证研究中，UI Remix 显着提高了参与者实现其设计目标的能力，促进了有效迭代，并鼓励探索替代设计。参与者还报告说，来源透明度提示增强了他们改编示例的信心。我们的研究结果为人工智能辅助、示例驱动的系统提出了新的方向，使最终用户能够以更好的控制、信任和开放的探索方式进行设计。
> **Abstract**: Designing user interfaces (UIs) is a critical step when launching products, building portfolios, or personalizing projects, yet end users without design expertise often struggle to articulate their intent and to trust design choices. Existing example-based tools either promote broad exploration, which can cause overwhelm and design drift, or require adapting a single example, risking design fixation. We present UI Remix, an interactive system that supports mobile UI design through an example-driven design workflow. Powered by a multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (MMRAG) model, UI Remix enables iterative search, selection, and adaptation of examples at both the global (whole interface) and local (component) level. To foster trust, it presents source transparency cues such as ratings, download counts, and developer information. In an empirical study with 24 end users, UI Remix significantly improved participants' ability to achieve their design goals, facilitated effective iteration, and encouraged exploration of alternative designs. Participants also reported that source transparency cues enhanced their confidence in adapting examples. Our findings suggest new directions for AI-assisted, example-driven systems that empower end users to design with greater control, trust, and openness to exploration.

【30】Anticipation Before Action: EEG-Based Implicit Intent Detection for Adaptive Gaze Interaction in Mixed Reality
- **标题**: 行动前的预期：基于脑电图的混合现实中自适应注视交互的隐式意图检测
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18750
> **作者**: Francesco Chiossi,Elnur Imamaliyev,Martin Bleichner,Sven Mayer
> **摘要**: 混合现实（MR）界面越来越依赖凝视进行交互，但区分视觉注意力和有意动作仍然很困难，从而导致了点石成金问题。现有的解决方案需要明确的确认，而脑机接口可以使用刺激先于负性（SPN）提供隐式的意图标记。我们研究了意图（选择与观察）和反馈（有与无）在基于凝视的 MR 交互过程中如何调节 SPN。在实际选择任务中，我们获取了 28 名参与者的脑电图和眼动追踪数据。 SPN 被强烈引发并且对这两个因素都很敏感：没有反馈的观察产生了最强的幅度，而选择的意图和对反馈的期望则减少了活动，这表明 SPN 反映了预期的不确定性而不是运动准备。深度学习模型的互补解码实现了可靠的、依赖于个人的用户意图分类，参与者的准确度在 75% 到 97% 之间。这些发现将 SPN 确定为构建意图感知 MR 界面的隐式标记，以减轻点石成金的影响。
> **Abstract**: Mixed Reality (MR) interfaces increasingly rely on gaze for interaction , yet distinguishing visual attention from intentional action remains difficult, leading to the Midas Touch problem. Existing solutions require explicit confirmations, while brain-computer interfaces may provide an implicit marker of intention using Stimulus-Preceding Negativity (SPN). We investigated how Intention (Select vs. Observe) and Feedback (With vs. Without) modulate SPN during gaze-based MR interactions. During realistic selection tasks, we acquired EEG and eye-tracking data from 28 participants. SPN was robustly elicited and sensitive to both factors: observation without feedback produced the strongest amplitudes, while intention to select and expectation of feedback reduced activity, suggesting SPN reflects anticipatory uncertainty rather than motor preparation. Complementary decoding with deep learning models achieved reliable person-dependent classification of user intention, with accuracies ranging from 75% to 97% across participants. These findings identify SPN as an implicit marker for building intention-aware MR interfaces that mitigate the Midas Touch.

【31】Bridging Instead of Replacing Online Coding Communities with AI through Community-Enriched Chatbot Designs
- **标题**: 通过社区丰富的聊天机器人设计，用人工智能桥接在线编码社区，而不是取代在线编码社区
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18697
> **作者**: Junling Wang,Lahari Goswami,Gustavo Kreia Umbelino,Kiara Garcia Chau,Mrinmaya Sachan,April Yi Wang
> **摘要**: ChatGPT 等基于 LLM 的聊天机器人已成为协助编码任务的流行工具。然而，它们常常产生孤立的反应，并且缺乏社会学习或情境基础的机制。相比之下，像 Kaggle 这样的在线编码社区提供了以社交为媒介的学习环境，可以培养批判性思维、参与度和归属感。然而，对法学硕士的日益依赖可能会减少对这些社区的参与并削弱其协作价值。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了社区丰富的人工智能，这是一种设计范例，通过呈现来自在线编码社区的用户生成的内容和社交设计功能，将社交学习动态嵌入到基于法学硕士的聊天机器人中。使用这种范例，我们实现了一个基于 RAG 的 AI 聊天机器人，利用 Kaggle 的资源来验证我们的设计。在分别涉及 28 名和 12 名数据科学学习者的两项实证研究中，我们发现社区丰富的 AI 显着增强了用户信任，鼓励与社区互动，并有效支持学习者解决数据科学任务。最后，我们讨论了人工智能辅助系统的设计含义，这些系统桥接（而不是取代）在线编码社区。
> **Abstract**: LLM-based chatbots like ChatGPT have become popular tools for assisting with coding tasks. However, they often produce isolated responses and lack mechanisms for social learning or contextual grounding. In contrast, online coding communities like Kaggle offer socially mediated learning environments that foster critical thinking, engagement, and a sense of belonging. Yet, growing reliance on LLMs risks diminishing participation in these communities and weakening their collaborative value. To address this, we propose Community-Enriched AI, a design paradigm that embeds social learning dynamics into LLM-based chatbots by surfacing user-generated content and social design feature from online coding communities. Using this paradigm, we implemented a RAG-based AI chatbot leveraging resources from Kaggle to validate our design. Across two empirical studies involving 28 and 12 data science learners, respectively, we found that Community-Enriched AI significantly enhances user trust, encourages engagement with community, and effectively supports learners in solving data science tasks. We conclude by discussing design implications for AI assistance systems that bridge -- rather than replace -- online coding communities.

【32】Unheard in the Digital Age: Rethinking AI Bias and Speech Diversity
- **标题**: 数字时代闻所未闻：重新思考人工智能偏见和语音多样性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18641
> **作者**: Onyedikachi Hope Amaechi-Okorie,Branislav Radeljic
> **摘要**: 言论仍然是当代社会中最明显但却被忽视的包容和排斥的载体之一。虽然流利程度通常等同于可信度和能力，但具有非典型言语模式的个人通常会被边缘化。鉴于目前的辩论状况，本文重点关注塑造非典型言论认知的结构性偏见，这些偏见现在正在被编码到人工智能中。自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统和语音接口主要接受标准化语音训练，通常无法识别或响应不同的声音，从而加剧了数字排斥。随着人工智能技术越来越多地调节机会的获取，该研究呼吁包容性的技术设计、反偏见培训以尽量减少歧视性算法决策的影响，以及可执行的政策改革，明确承认语音多样性是一个公平问题，而不仅仅是可访问性。该文章借鉴跨学科研究，主张在如何重视声音方面进行文化和制度转变，敦促共同创建解决方案，以提升数字时代非典型发言者的权利、代表性和现实。最终，本文将语音包容性重新定义为公平（而不是通融）的问题，并倡导共同创建反映人类全部声音的人工智能系统。
> **Abstract**: Speech remains one of the most visible yet overlooked vectors of inclusion and exclusion in contemporary society. While fluency is often equated with credibility and competence, individuals with atypical speech patterns are routinely marginalized. Given the current state of the debate, this article focuses on the structural biases that shape perceptions of atypical speech and are now being encoded into artificial intelligence. Automated speech recognition (ASR) systems and voice interfaces, trained predominantly on standardized speech, routinely fail to recognize or respond to diverse voices, compounding digital exclusion. As AI technologies increasingly mediate access to opportunity, the study calls for inclusive technological design, anti-bias training to minimize the impact of discriminatory algorithmic decisions, and enforceable policy reform that explicitly recognize speech diversity as a matter of equity, not merely accessibility. Drawing on interdisciplinary research, the article advocates for a cultural and institutional shift in how we value voice, urging co-created solutions that elevate the rights, representation, and realities of atypical speakers in the digital age. Ultimately, the article reframes speech inclusion as a matter of equity (not accommodation) and advocates for co-created AI systems that reflect the full spectrum of human voices.

【33】BAIT: Visual-illusion-inspired Privacy Preservation for Mobile Data Visualization
- **标题**: BAIT：受视觉错觉启发的移动数据可视化隐私保护
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18497
> **作者**: Sizhe Cheng,Songheng Zhang,Dong Ma,Yong Wang
> **摘要**: 随着移动数据可视化的盛行，人们越来越担心其隐私风险，尤其是肩窥攻击。受先前视觉错觉研究的启发，我们提出了 BAIT，这是一种通过在给定可视化上叠加诱饵可视化来自动生成隐私保护可视化的新颖方法。通过调整诱饵可视化的不同视觉通道（例如形状、位置、倾斜、大小、颜色和空间频率），它可以让近距离的可视化所有者清楚地辨别原始可视化，并让远处的肩冲浪者被诱饵可视化误导。我们明确地模拟了不同观看距离下的人类感知效果，以优化诱饵可视化设计。隐私保护示例和两项深入的用户研究证明了 BAIT 在受控实验室研究和现实场景中的有效性。
> **Abstract**: With the prevalence of mobile data visualizations, there have been growing concerns about their privacy risks, especially shoulder surfing attacks. Inspired by prior research on visual illusion, we propose BAIT, a novel approach to automatically generate privacy-preserving visualizations by stacking a decoy visualization over a given visualization. It allows visualization owners at proximity to clearly discern the original visualization and makes shoulder surfers at a distance be misled by the decoy visualization, by adjusting different visual channels of a decoy visualization (e.g., shape, position, tilt, size, color and spatial frequency). We explicitly model human perception effect at different viewing distances to optimize the decoy visualization design. Privacy-preserving examples and two in-depth user studies demonstrate the effectiveness of BAIT in both controlled lab study and real-world scenarios.

【34】Collaposer: Transforming Photo Collections into Visual Assets for Storytelling with Collages
- **标题**: Collaposer：将照片集转化为视觉资产，用拼贴画讲故事
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18428
> **作者**: Jiayi Zhou,Liwenhan Xie,Jiaju Ma,Zheng Wei,Huamin Qu,Anyi Rao
> **摘要**: 数字拼贴是一种结合图像剪切来讲述故事的艺术实践。然而，从一组照片中准备剪贴画仍然是一项乏味且耗时的任务。一项形成性研究确定了三个主要挑战：1）相关照片搜索效率低下，2）手动图像剪切，3）组织大​​量剪切的困难。为了应对这些挑战并促进拼贴的资产准备，我们提出了 Collaposer，这是一种根据用户提供的故事描述将照片集转换为有组织的、随时可用的视觉剪切图的工具。 Collaposer 对照片进行标记、检测和分割，然后使用 LLM 根据用户提供的故事描述选择中心标签和相关标签。 Collaposer 以不同的尺寸呈现最终的视觉效果，并根据语义层次结构进行聚类。我们的评估表明，Collaposer 有效地自动化了准备过程，以生成符合故事情节的各种视觉剪辑集，使用户能够专注于拼贴这些资产以讲故事。项目网站：https://jiayzhou.github.io/collaposer-website/
> **Abstract**: Digital collage is an artistic practice that combines image cutouts to tell stories. However, preparing cutouts from a set of photos remains a tedious and time-consuming task. A formative study identified three main challenges: 1) inefficient search for relevant photos, 2) manual image cutout, and 3) difficulty in organizing large sets of cutouts. To meet these challenges and facilitate asset preparation for collage, we propose Collaposer, a tool that transforms a collection of photos into organized, ready-to-use visual cutouts based on user-provided story descriptions. Collaposer tags, detects, and segments photos, and then uses an LLM to select central and related labels based on the user-provided story description. Collaposer presents the resulting visuals in varying sizes, clustered according to semantic hierarchy. Our evaluation shows that Collaposer effectively automates the preparation process to produce diverse sets of visual cutouts adhering to the storyline, allowing users to focus on collaging these assets for storytelling. Project website: https://jiayzhou.github.io/collaposer-website/

【35】Fusion of Spatio-Temporal and Multi-Scale Frequency Features for Dry Electrodes MI-EEG Decoding
- **标题**: 干电极 MI-EEG 解码的时空和多尺度频率特征融合
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18424
> **作者**: Tianyi Gong,Can Han,Junxi Wu,Dahong Qian
> **摘要**: 干电极运动想象脑电图 (MI-EEG) 通过消除凝胶并缩短家庭和可穿戴设备的设置，实现快速、舒适、真实的脑机接口。然而，干记录会带来三个主要问题：信噪比较低，基线漂移和突然瞬变较多；数据较弱、噪声较大，试验间相位对齐较差；以及会话之间更大的差异。这些缺点导致更大的数据分布变化，使得 MI-EEG 任务的特征不太稳定。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 STGMFM，这是一种为干电极 MI-EEG 量身定制的三分支框架，它通过双图阶对互补的时空依赖性进行建模，并通过多尺度混频分支捕获鲁棒的包络动态，其动机是观察到幅度包络对接触变化的敏感度低于瞬时波形。生理上有意义的连接先验指导学习，决策级融合巩固了耐噪共识。在我们收集的干电极 MI-EEG 上，STGMFM 始终超越竞争性 CNN/Transformer/graph 基线。代码可在 https://github.com/Tianyi-325/STGMFM 获取。
> **Abstract**: Dry-electrode Motor Imagery Electroencephalography (MI-EEG) enables fast, comfortable, real-world Brain Computer Interface by eliminating gels and shortening setup for at-home and wearable use.However, dry recordings pose three main issues: lower Signal-to-Noise Ratio with more baseline drift and sudden transients; weaker and noisier data with poor phase alignment across trials; and bigger variances between sessions.
