These drawbacks lead to larger data distribution shift, making features less stable for MI-EEG tasks.To address these problems, we introduce STGMFM, a tri-branch framework tailored for dry-electrode MI-EEG, which models complementary spatio-temporal dependencies via dual graph orders, and captures robust envelope dynamics with a multi-scale frequency mixing branch, motivated by the observation that amplitude envelopes are less sensitive to contact variability than instantaneous waveforms. Physiologically meaningful connectivity priors guide learning, and decision-level fusion consolidates a noise-tolerant consensus. On our collected dry-electrode MI-EEG, STGMFM consistently surpasses competitive CNN/Transformer/graph baselines. Codes are available at https://github.com/Tianyi-325/STGMFM.

【36】MarioChart: Autonomous Tangibles as Active Proxy Interfaces for Embodied Casual Data Exploration
- **标题**: MarioChart：自主有形资产作为体现休闲数据探索的主动代理接口
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18328
> **作者**: Shaozhang Dai,Kadek Ananta Satriadi,Jim Smiley,Barrett Ens,Lonni Besançon,Tim Dwyer
> **摘要**: 我们引入了主动代理接口的概念，即有形模型作为物理数据对象的代理，支持通过主动操作对数据进行交互式探索。我们实现了一个主动代理数据可视化系统“MarioChart”，使用机器人推车在桌面上重新定位，例如，与地图或其他视觉布局中的数据指示物对齐。我们考虑涉及多元校园可持续性数据集的休闲数据探索场景，使用比例模型作为其物理建筑数据参考的代理。我们的实证研究 (n=12) 将主动代理的使用与传统平板电脑交互进行比较，发现我们的主动代理系统增强了数据的短期空间记忆，并能够更快地完成某些数据分析任务。与传统触摸屏相比，它在长期记忆、身体疲劳、脑力负荷或用户参与度方面没有显着差异。我们的研究为主动代理技术提供了初步基线，并增进了对情境数据可视化中有形界面的理解。
> **Abstract**: We introduce the notion of an Active Proxy interface, i.e. tangible models as proxies for physical data referents, supporting interactive exploration of data through active manipulation. We realise an active proxy data visualisation system, "MarioChart", using robot carts relocating themselves on a tabletop, e.g., to align with their data referents in a map or other visual layout. We consider a casual-data exploration scenario involving a multivariate campus sustainability dataset, using scale models as proxies for their physical building data referents. Our empirical study (n=12) compares active proxy use with conventional tablet interaction, finding that our active proxy system enhances short-term spatial memory of data and enables faster completion of certain data analytic tasks. It shows no significant differences compared to traditional touch-screens in long-term memory, physical fatigue, mental workload, or user engagement. Our study offers an initial baseline for active proxy techniques and advances understanding of tangible interfaces in situated data visualisation.

【37】When Nobody Around Is Real: Exploring Public Opinions and User Experiences On the Multi-Agent AI Social Platform
- **标题**: 当周围没有人是真实的时候：探索多智能体人工智能社交平台上的舆论和用户体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18275
> **作者**: Qiufang Yu,Mengmeng Wu,Xingyu Lan
> **摘要**: 在大型语言模型的支持下，一种新型的多智能体社交平台已经出现。 Social.AI 等应用程序部署了大量模仿人类行为的人工智能代理，创建了前所未有的以机器人为中心的社交网络。然而，现有的研究主要集中在一对一的聊天机器人上，而对多代理人工智能平台的探索还不够。为了弥补这一差距，我们以 Social.AI 作为案例研究，并进行了两个阶段的调查：（i）对 883 条用户评论进行内容分析； (ii) 对 20 名参与者进行为期 7 天的日记研究，记录他们的第一手平台体验。虽然公众言论表达了更大的怀疑，但日记研究发现，用户确实将一系列社会期望投射到人工智能代理身上。虽然满足了一些用户的期望，但人工智能主导的社交环境引入了明显的问题，例如注意力过载和同质化交互。这些紧张局势预示着未来人工智能将不仅仅作为一种工具或拟人化的行动者，而且作为社会本身的主导媒介——一种范式转变，预示着新的社会生活形式。
> **Abstract**: Powered by large language models, a new genre of multi-agent social platforms has emerged. Apps such as Social.AI deploy numerous AI agents that emulate human behavior, creating unprecedented bot-centric social networks. Yet, existing research has predominantly focused on one-on-one chatbots, leaving multi-agent AI platforms underexplored. To bridge this gap, we took Social.AI as a case study and performed a two-stage investigation: (i) content analysis of 883 user comments; (ii) a 7-day diary study with 20 participants to document their firsthand platform experiences. While public discourse expressed greater skepticism, the diary study found that users did project a range of social expectations onto the AI agents. While some user expectations were met, the AI-dominant social environment introduces distinct problems, such as attention overload and homogenized interaction. These tensions signal a future where AI functions not merely as a tool or an anthropomorphized actor, but as the dominant medium of sociality itself-a paradigm shift that foregrounds new forms of architected social life.

【38】Probing the Future of Meta-Analysis: Eliciting Design Principles via an Agentic Research IDE
- **标题**: 探索荟萃分析的未来：通过代理研究 IDE 引出设计原则
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18239
> **作者**: Sizhe Cheng,Feng Liang,Yuhan Wen,Xipei Yu,Yong Wang
> **摘要**: 荟萃分析和系统评价需要严格的溯因推理，以在大量异构文献中建立、测试和完善假设。虽然 NLP 的进步已经实现了该流程的自动化部分，但现有工具常常使研究人员脱离认知循环或仅充当检索引擎，从而导致知识所有权的丧失和频繁的上下文切换。我们推出 Research IDE，这是一个通过“研究即代码”比喻重新构想创作环境的原型。 Research IDE 将多代理后端嵌入到写入流程中，从而可以通过“假设断点”进行现场验证。由 8 名领域专家参与的为期一周的现场部署，以及随后举行的反思研讨会，作为研究设计 (RtD) 的探索，表明用户强烈喜欢这种验证工作流程，积极利用先验知识进行确认，并报告说断点激发了洞察力。根据参与者的反馈和建议，我们得出了对未来人工智能辅助研究工具的设计启示，这些工具在利用计算规模的同时充分保留了研究人员的自主权和知识所有权。
> **Abstract**: Meta-analyses and systematic reviews demand rigorous abductive reasoning to build, test, and refine hypotheses across vast, heterogeneous literature. While NLP advancements have automated parts of this pipeline, existing tools often detach researchers from the cognitive loop or function merely as retrieval engines, leading to loss of intellectual ownership and frequent context switching. We present Research IDE, a prototype reimagining authoring environments through the "Research as Code" metaphor. Research IDE embeds a multi-agent backend into the writing flow, enabling in-situ verification via "hypothesis breakpoints." A one-week field deployment with 8 domain experts, followed by a reflective workshop, as a Research through Design (RtD) probe, reveals that users strongly preferred this verification workflow, actively leveraged prior knowledge for confirmation, and reported that breakpoints sparked insights. Drawing from participant feedback and suggestions, we derive design implications for future AI-assisted research tools that fully preserve researcher autonomy and intellectual ownership while harnessing computational scale.

【39】PaperTok: Exploring the Use of Generative AI for Creating Short-form Videos for Research Communication
- **标题**: PaperTok：探索使用生成式人工智能来创建用于研究交流的短片
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18218
> **作者**: Meziah Ruby Cristobal,Hyeonjeong Byeon,Tze-Yu Chen,Ruoxi Shang,Donghoon Shin,Ruican Zhong,Tony Zhou,Gary Hsieh
> **摘要**: 学术研究的传播至关重要，但研究人员往往缺乏时间和技能来为流行媒体（例如短视频）创建引人入胜的内容。为了解决这一差距，我们探索使用生成式人工智能来帮助研究人员将他们的学术论文转化为易于访问的视频内容。根据与科学传播者和内容创作者 (N=8) 进行的形成性研究，我们设计了 PaperTok，这是一个端到端系统，通过从源论文生成脚本选项和相应的视听内容来自动化最初的创造性劳动。然后，研究人员可以根据自己的喜好并进一步提示进行改进。混合方法用户研究 (N=18) 和众包评估 (N=100) 表明 PaperTok 的工作流程可以帮助研究人员创建引人入胜且信息丰富的短片。我们还确定了在创建过程中需要更细粒度的控制。为此，我们为支持科学推广的未来生成工具提供了启示。
> **Abstract**: The dissemination of scholarly research is critical, yet researchers often lack the time and skills to create engaging content for popular media such as short-form videos. To address this gap, we explore the use of generative AI to help researchers transform their academic papers into accessible video content. Informed by a formative study with science communicators and content creators (N=8), we designed PaperTok, an end-to-end system that automates the initial creative labor by generating script options and corresponding audiovisual content from a source paper. Researchers can then refine based on their preferences with further prompting. A mixed-methods user study (N=18) and crowdsourced evaluation (N=100) demonstrate that PaperTok's workflow can help researchers create engaging and informative short-form videos. We also identified the need for more fine-grained controls in the creation process. To this end, we offer implications for future generative tools that support science outreach.

【40】InkIdeator: Supporting Chinese-Style Visual Design Ideation via AI-Infused Exploration of Chinese Paintings
- **标题**: InkIdeator：通过人工智能对中国画的探索支持中国式视觉设计理念
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18193
> **作者**: Shiwei Wu,Ziyao Gao,Zhendong He,Zongtan He,Zhupeng Huang,Xia Chen,Wei Zeng,Xiaojuan Ma,Zhenhui Peng
> **摘要**: 视觉设计师在创作中国风格的插图、海报等时，经常从中国画中寻求灵感。我们的形成性研究（N=10）表明，在构思过程中，设计师学习中国画中的文化符号、情感、构图和风格，但在寻找、分析和整合这些维度方面面临挑战。本文利用多模态大型模型来注释 16,315 张中国画中每个维度的价值，在此基础上我们提出了 InkIdeator，一个中国风格视觉设计的构思支持系统。 InkIdeator建议与任务主题相关的文化符号，提供维度关键词来帮助分析中国画，并结合用户选择的关键词生成视觉示例。我们使用未提取维度关键词的基线系统进行的受试者内研究（N=12），以及中国画家的两个扩展用例，表明 InkIdeator 在创意构思支持方面的有效性，帮助用户有效地探索中国画中的文化维度并可视化他们的想法。我们讨论了利用生成人工智能支持与文化相关的视觉设计理念的影响。
> **Abstract**: Visual designers often seek inspiration from Chinese paintings when tasked with creating Chinese-style illustrations, posters, etc. Our formative study (N=10) reveals that during ideation, designers learn the cultural symbols, emotions, compositions, and styles in Chinese paintings but face challenges in searching, analyzing, and integrating these dimensions. This paper leverages multi-modal large models to annotate the value of each dimension in 16,315 Chinese paintings, built on which we propose InkIdeator, an ideation support system for Chinese-style visual designs. InkIdeator suggests cultural symbols associated with the task theme, provides dimensional keywords to help analyze Chinese paintings, and generates visual examples integrating user-selected keywords. Our within-subjects study (N=12) using a baseline system without extracted dimensional keywords, along with two extended use cases by Chinese painters, indicates InkIdeator's effectiveness in creative ideation support, helping users efficiently explore cultural dimensions in Chinese paintings and visualize their ideas. We discuss implications for supporting culture-related visual design ideation with generative AI.

【41】Exploring Customizable Interactive Tools for Therapeutic Homework Support in Mental Health Counseling
- **标题**: 探索心理健康咨询中治疗性作业支持的可定制互动工具
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18179
> **作者**: Yimeng Wang,Liabette Escamilla,Yinzhou Wang,Bianca R. Augustine,Yixuan Zhang
> **摘要**: 治疗作业（即治疗师分配给客户在治疗期间完成的任务）对于有效的心理治疗至关重要，但治疗师经常在有限的准备时间内解释零散的客户日志、评估和反思。我们与持证治疗师的形成性研究揭示了三个关键的设计要求：支持解释非结构化的客户自我报告、与临床目标一致的定制以及跨多个数据源的无缝集成。然后，我们设计并开发了 TheraTrack，这是一种可定制的、面向治疗师的工具，它集成了多维数据并利用大型语言模型来生成可追踪的摘要并支持自然语言查询，以简化会话之间的作业跟踪。我们对 14 名治疗师进行的试点研究表明，TheraTrack 减少了他们的认知负荷，通过从人工智能摘要到原始数据条目的直接导航实现了验证，并且与治疗中使用相比，对私人分析进行了不同的调整，依赖性根据治疗师的经验和使用持续时间而变化。我们还讨论了以临床医生为中心的人工智能对心理健康的设计影响。
> **Abstract**: Therapeutic homework (i.e., tasks assigned by therapists for clients to complete between sessions) is essential for effective psychotherapy, yet therapists often interpret fragmented client logs, assessments, and reflections within limited preparation time. Our formative study with licensed therapists revealed three critical design requirements: support for interpreting unstructured client self-reports, customization aligned with clinical objectives, and seamless integration across multiple data sources. We then designed and developed TheraTrack, a customizable, therapist-facing tool that integrates multi-dimensional data and leverages large language models to generate traceable summaries and support natural-language queries, to streamline between-session homework tracking. Our pilot study with 14 therapists showed that TheraTrack reduced their cognitive load, enabled verification through direct navigation from AI summaries to original data entries, and was adapted differently for private analysis compared to in-session use, with dependence varying based on therapist experience and usage duration. We also discuss design implications for clinician-centered AI for mental health.

【42】Lip-Siri: Contactless Open-Sentence Silent Speech with Wi-Fi Backscatter
- **标题**: Lip-Siri：带 Wi-Fi 反向散射的非接触式开放式无声语音
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18177
> **作者**: Ye Tian,Haohua Du,Chao Gu,Junyang Zhang,Shanyue Wang,Hao Zhou,Jiahui Hou,Xiang-Yang Li
> **摘要**: 无声语音接口 (SSI) 可在噪声敏感或隐私敏感的环境中实现无声交互。然而，现有的 SSI 面临着隐私、用户体验和能源消耗之间的实际部署权衡，并且大多数仍然仅限于对小型预定义词汇或句子的封闭集识别，这限制了现实世界的表达能力。在本文中，据我们所知，我们提出了 Lip-Siri，这是第一个基于 Wi-Fi 反向散射的 SSI，它通过词典引导的子词解码支持开放词汇句子识别。 Lip-Siri 设计了频移反向散射标签来隔离标签调制反射并抑制非目标运动的干扰，从而能够从无处不在的 Wi-Fi 信号中可靠地提取唇部运动轨迹。然后，我们将连续轨迹分割成唇部运动单元，对它们进行聚类，通过基于聚类的自监督学习鲁棒的单元表示，最后提出一个词典引导的 Transformer 编码器 - 具有波束搜索的解码器来解码可变长度的句子序列。我们实现了一个端到端原型，并由 15 名参与者在多个场景中对 340 个句子和 3,398 个单词进行评估。 Lip-Siri 在单词预测方面实现了 85.61% 的准确率，在连续句子识别方面实现了 36.87% 的 WER，接近代表性的基于视觉的唇读系统的性能。
> **Abstract**: Silent speech interfaces (SSIs) enable silent interaction in noise-sensitive or privacy-sensitive settings. However, existing SSIs face practical deployment trade-offs among privacy, user experience, and energy consumption, and most remain limited to closed-set recognition over small, pre-defined vocabularies of words or sentences, which restricts real-world expressiveness. In this paper, we present Lip-Siri, to the best of our knowledge, the first Wi-Fi backscatter--based SSI that supports open-vocabulary sentence recognition via lexicon-guided subword decoding. Lip-Siri designs a frequency-shifted backscatter tag to isolate tag-modulated reflections and suppress interference from non-target motions, enabling reliable extraction of lip-motion traces from ubiquitous Wi-Fi signals. We then segment continuous traces into lip-motion units, cluster them, learn robust unit representations via cluster-based self-supervision, and finally propose a lexicon-guided Transformer encoder--decoder with beam search to decode variable-length sentence sequences. We implement an end-to-end prototype and evaluate it with 15 participants on 340 sentences and 3,398 words across multiple scenarios. Lip-Siri achieves 85.61% accuracy on word prediction and a WER of 36.87% on continuous sentence recognition, approaching the performance of representative vision-based lip-reading systems.

【43】EndoExtract: Co-Designing Structured Text Extraction from Endometriosis Ultrasound Reports
- **标题**: EndoExtract：共同设计从子宫内膜异位症超声报告中提取结构化文本
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18154
> **作者**: Haiyi Li,Yiyang Zhao,Yutong Li,Alison Deslandes,Jodie Avery,Mary Louise Hull,Hsiang-Ting Chen
> **摘要**: 子宫内膜异位症超声报告通常是非结构化的自由文本文档，需要手动提取下游任务，例如分析、机器学习模型训练和临床审计。我们推出了 \textbf{EndoExtract}，这是一个由 LLM 驱动的本地系统，可以从这些报告中提取结构化数据并显示解释字段以供人工审核。通过与研究助理进行情境调查，我们确定了关键的工作流程痛点：数值字段和解释字段之间的不对称信任、重复的手动突出显示、持续比较带来的疲劳以及放射科医生之间的术语不一致。这些发现通知了一个界面，该界面仅显示用于强制审查的解释字段，自动突出显示 PDF 中的源证据，并将批量提取与人工验证分开。一次形成性研讨会表明，\textbf{EndoExtract} 支持从逐字段数据输入到监督验证的转变，尽管参与者指出了过度浏览的风险和管理丢失数据的挑战。
> **Abstract**: Endometriosis ultrasound reports are often unstructured free-text documents that require manual abstraction for downstream tasks such as analytics, machine learning model training, and clinical auditing. We present \textbf{EndoExtract}, an on-premise LLM-powered system that extracts structured data from these reports and surfaces interpretive fields for human review. Through contextual inquiry with research assistants, we identified key workflow pain points: asymmetric trust between numerical and interpretive fields, repetitive manual highlighting, fatigue from sustained comparison, and terminology inconsistency across radiologists. These findings informed an interface that surfaces only interpretive fields for mandatory review, automatically highlights source evidence within PDFs, and separates batch extraction from human-paced verification. A formative workshop revealed that \textbf{EndoExtract} supports a shift from field-by-field data entry to supervisory validation, though participants noted risks of over-skimming and challenges in managing missing data.

【44】Understanding Users' Privacy Reasoning and Behaviors During Chatbot Use to Support Meaningful Agency in Privacy
- **标题**: 了解用户在使用聊天机器人期间的隐私推理和行为，以支持有意义的隐私代理
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18125
> **作者**: Mohammad Hadi Nezhad,Francisco Enrique Vicente Castro,Ivon Arroyo
> **摘要**: 会话代理 (CA)（例如聊天机器人）越来越多地用于用户披露敏感信息的环境中，引发了严重的隐私问题。由于隐私判断与上下文高度相关，因此支持用户在聊天机器人交互期间采取隐私保护行动至关重要。然而，实现有意义的参与需要更深入地了解用户当前在现实的聊天机器人使用场景中如何推理和管理敏感信息。为了调查这一点，我们在一系列现实的聊天机器人任务中定性地检查了计算机科学（本科生和硕士）学生的即时披露和保护行为，以及这些行为背后的推理。参与者使用带有或不带有隐私通知面板的模拟 ChatGPT 界面，该面板会拦截消息提交、突出显示潜在敏感信息并提供隐私保护操作。该面板通过撤回、伪造和泛化支持匿名化，并显示 ChatGPT 的两个内置隐私控制以提高其可发现性。根据互动日志、大声思考和调查回复，我们分析了专家组如何培养隐私意识、鼓励采取保护行动，并支持针对保护哪些信息以及如何保护的具体情境推理。我们进一步讨论了工具的设计机会，这些工具为用户在 CA 交互期间保护敏感信息提供了更大、更有意义的代理。
> **Abstract**: Conversational agents (CAs) (e.g., chatbots) are increasingly used in settings where users disclose sensitive information, raising significant privacy concerns. Because privacy judgments are highly contextual, supporting users to engage in privacy-protective actions during chatbot interactions is essential. However, enabling meaningful engagement requires a deeper understanding of how users currently reason about and manage sensitive information during realistic chatbot use scenarios. To investigate this, we qualitatively examined computer science (undergraduate and masters) students' in-the-moment disclosure and protection behaviors, as well as the reasoning underlying these behaviors, across a range of realistic chatbot tasks. Participants used a simulated ChatGPT interface with and without a privacy notice panel that intercepts message submissions, highlights potentially sensitive information, and offers privacy protective actions. The panel supports anonymization through retracting, faking, and generalizing, and surfaces two of ChatGPT's built-in privacy controls to improve their discoverability. Drawing on interaction logs, think-alouds, and survey responses, we analyzed how the panel fostered privacy awareness, encouraged protective actions, and supported context-specific reasoning about what information to protect and how. We further discuss design opportunities for tools that provide users greater and more meaningful agency in protecting sensitive information during CA interactions.

【45】From Struggle to Success: Context-Aware Guidance for Screen Reader Users in Computer Use
- **标题**: 从奋斗到成功：屏幕阅读器用户在计算机使用中的情境感知指南
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18092
> **作者**: Nan Chen,Jing Lu,Zilong Wang,Luna K. Qiu,Siming Chen,Yuqing Yang
> **摘要**: 平等获得数字技术对于教育、就业和社会参与至关重要。然而，主流界面都是以视觉为导向的，这给屏幕阅读器用户带来了陡峭的学习曲线和频繁的障碍，并限制了他们的独立性和机会。现有的支持不足——教程主要针对视力正常的用户，而人工帮助缺乏实时可用性。我们推出 AskEase，这是一款按需人工智能助手，可为计算机使用提供分步、屏幕阅读器用户友好的指导。 AskEase 管理多个上下文源，以推断用户意图并提供精确的、针对具体情况的指导。其无缝交互设计最大限度地减少了干扰并减少了寻求帮助的工作量。我们通过代表性的使用场景和稳健性测试证明了其有效性。在一项针对 12 名屏幕阅读器用户的受试者内研究中，AskEase 显着提高了任务成功率，同时减少了感知工作量，包括体力需求、努力和挫败感。这些结果证明了法学硕士支持的助手在促进无障碍计算和为视力障碍用户扩大机会方面的潜力。
> **Abstract**: Equal access to digital technologies is critical for education, employment, and social participation. However, mainstream interfaces are visually oriented, creating steep learning curves and frequent obstacles for screen reader users, and limiting their independence and opportunities. Existing support is inadequate -- tutorials mainly target sighted users, while human assistance lacks real-time availability. We introduce AskEase, an on-demand AI assistant that provides step-by-step, screen reader user-friendly guidance for computer use. AskEase manages multiple sources of context to infer user intent and deliver precise, situation-specific guidance. Its seamless interaction design minimizes disruption and reduces the effort of seeking help. We demonstrated its effectiveness through representative usage scenarios and robustness tests. In a within-subjects study with 12 screen reader users, AskEase significantly improved task success while reducing perceived workload, including physical demand, effort, and frustration. These results demonstrate the potential of LLM-powered assistants to promote accessible computing and expand opportunities for users with visual impairments.

【46】"Crash Test Dummies" for AI-Enabled Clinical Assessment: Validating Virtual Patient Scenarios with Virtual Learners
- **标题**: 用于人工智能临床评估的“碰撞测试假人”：使用虚拟学习者验证虚拟患者场景
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18085
> **作者**: Brian Gin,Ahreum Lim,Flávia Silva e Oliveira,Kuan Xing,Xiaomei Song,Gayana Amiyangoda,Thilanka Seneviratne,Alison F. Doubleday,Ananya Gangopadhyaya,Bob Kiser,Lukas Shum-Tim,Dhruva Patel,Kosala Marambe,Lauren Maggio,Ara Tekian,Yoon Soo Park
> **摘要**: 背景：在医疗和健康专业教育（HPE）中，人工智能越来越多地用于评估临床能力，包括通过虚拟标准化患者。然而，大多数评估依赖于人工智能与人类评估者之间的可靠性，并且缺乏案例、学习者和评估者如何共同形成分数的衡量框架。这使得鲁棒性变得不确定，并且可能使学习者受到未经验证的系统的误导。我们通过使用人工智能“模拟学习者”在人类使用之前对评估管道进行压力测试和心理测量表征来解决这个问题。目标：开发开源 AI 虚拟患者平台和测量模型，以便跨病例和评级条件进行稳健的能力评估。方法：我们构建了一个平台，其中包括虚拟患者、具有可调整的 ACGME 能力概况的虚拟学习者，以及多个独立的 AI 评分者，对结构化关键特征项目的遭遇进行评分。使用贝叶斯 HRM-SDT 模型对成绩单进行分析，该模型将评分视为不确定性下的决策，并将学习者能力、案例表现和评分者行为分开；参数通过MCMC估计。结果：该模型恢复了模拟学习者的能力，尽管管道具有不确定性，但与所有 ACGME 领域的生成能力具有显着相关性。它通过能力估计案例难度，并使用相同的模型/提示但不同的种子，在人工智能评分者中显示稳定的评分者检测（灵敏度）和标准（严重性/宽大阈值）。我们还提出了一个分阶段的“安全蓝图”，用于与学习者一起部署人工智能工具，并与基于委托的验证里程碑相关联。结论：将专门构建的虚拟患者平台与原则性心理测量模型相结合，可以实现稳健、可解释、可概括的能力估计，并支持在与人类学习者一起使用之前验证人工智能辅助评估。
> **Abstract**: Background: In medical and health professions education (HPE), AI is increasingly used to assess clinical competencies, including via virtual standardized patients. However, most evaluations rely on AI-human interrater reliability and lack a measurement framework for how cases, learners, and raters jointly shape scores. This leaves robustness uncertain and can expose learners to misguidance from unvalidated systems. We address this by using AI "simulated learners" to stress-test and psychometrically characterize assessment pipelines before human use. Objective: Develop an open-source AI virtual patient platform and measurement model for robust competency evaluation across cases and rating conditions. Methods: We built a platform with virtual patients, virtual learners with tunable ACGME-aligned competency profiles, and multiple independent AI raters scoring encounters with structured Key-Features items. Transcripts were analyzed with a Bayesian HRM-SDT model that treats ratings as decisions under uncertainty and separates learner ability, case performance, and rater behavior; parameters were estimated with MCMC. Results: The model recovered simulated learners' competencies, with significant correlations to the generating competencies across all ACGME domains despite a non-deterministic pipeline. It estimated case difficulty by competency and showed stable rater detection (sensitivity) and criteria (severity/leniency thresholds) across AI raters using identical models/prompts but different seeds. We also propose a staged "safety blueprint" for deploying AI tools with learners, tied to entrustment-based validation milestones. Conclusions: Combining a purpose-built virtual patient platform with a principled psychometric model enables robust, interpretable, generalizable competency estimates and supports validation of AI-assisted assessment prior to use with human learners.

【47】An Experimental Comparison of Cognitive Forcing Functions for Execution Plans in AI-Assisted Writing: Effects On Trust, Overreliance, and Perceived Critical Thinking
- **标题**: 人工智能辅助写作中执行计划的认知强迫功能的实验比较：对信任、过度依赖和感知批判性思维的影响
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18033
> **作者**: Ahana Ghosh,Advait Sarkar,Siân Lindley,Christian Poelitz
> **摘要**: 生成式人工智能 (GenAI) 工具可以提高写作等知识工作流程的生产力，但也存在过度依赖和减少批判性思维的风险。认知强迫功能（CFF）通过要求积极参与人工智能输出来减轻这些风险。随着 GenAI 工作流程变得越来越复杂，系统越来越多地提供执行计划供用户查看。然而，这些计划本身是人工智能生成的，容易过度依赖，而且将 CFF 应用于人工智能计划的有效性仍未得到充分探索。我们进行了一项对照实验，参与者完成人工智能辅助写作任务，同时在四种 CFF 条件下审查人工智能生成的计划：假设（论证分析）、WhatIf（假设检验）、两者和无 CFF 控制。后续的发声思考和访谈研究对这些条件进行了定性比较。结果表明，假设 CFF 在不增加认知负荷的情况下最有效地减少了过度依赖，而参与者认为 WhatIf CFF 最有帮助。这些发现强调了以计划为中心的 CFF 在支持 GenAI 辅助知识工作中的批判性反思方面的价值。
> **Abstract**: Generative AI (GenAI) tools improve productivity in knowledge workflows such as writing, but also risk overreliance and reduced critical thinking. Cognitive forcing functions (CFFs) mitigate these risks by requiring active engagement with AI output. As GenAI workflows grow more complex, systems increasingly present execution plans for user review. However, these plans are themselves AI-generated and prone to overreliance, and the effectiveness of applying CFFs to AI plans remains underexplored. We conduct a controlled experiment in which participants completed AI-assisted writing tasks while reviewing AI-generated plans under four CFF conditions: Assumption (argument analysis), WhatIf (hypothesis testing), Both, and a no-CFF control. A follow-up think-aloud and interview study qualitatively compared these conditions. Results show that the Assumption CFF most effectively reduced overreliance without increasing cognitive load, while participants perceived the WhatIf CFF as most helpful. These findings highlight the value of plan-focused CFFs for supporting critical reflection in GenAI-assisted knowledge work.

【48】Gradual Generation of User Interfaces as a Design Method for Malleable Software
- **标题**: 逐步生成用户界面作为可延展软件的设计方法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17975
> **作者**: Bryan Min,Peiling Jiang,Zhicheng Huang,Haijun Xia
> **摘要**: 人工智能越来越能够根据用户提示自动生成用户界面 (GenUI)。然而，设计 GenUI 应用程序，使用户能够发现不同的定制，同时保留 GenUI 的表现力仍然具有挑战性。当前的设计方法（呈现提示框和利用上下文）缺乏自定义发现的功能，而鉴于 GenUI 巨大的自定义空间，传统的基于菜单的方法变得过于复杂。我们提出逐渐生成用户界面——一种将定制构建到中间 UI 层的设计方法，AI 在界面生成过程中逐渐加载这些中间 UI 层。这些中间阶段沿着特定维度公开不同的定制功能，使用户可以发现它们。用户可以回退生成过程以访问自定义。我们通过三个原型网站演示了这种方法，展示了设计人员如何支持 GenUI 的扩展定制功能，同时保持视觉简洁性和可发现性。我们的工作提供了一种将定制功能集成到 GenUI 应用程序中的实用方法，为设计可延展的软件提供了一种方法。
> **Abstract**: AI is growing increasingly capable of automatically generating user interfaces (GenUI) from user prompts. However, designing GenUI applications that enable users to discover diverse customizations while preserving GenUI's expressiveness remains challenging. Current design methods -- presenting prompt boxes and leveraging context -- lack affordances for customization discovery, while traditional menu-based approaches become overly complex given GenUI's vast customization space. We propose Gradually Generating User Interfaces -- a design method that structures customizations into intermediate UI layers that AI gradually loads during interface generation. These intermediate stages expose different customization features along specific dimensions, making them discoverable to users. Users can wind back the generation process to access customizations. We demonstrate this approach through three prototype websites, showing how designers can support GenUI's expanded customization capabilities while maintaining visual simplicity and discoverability. Our work offers a practical method for integrating customization features into GenUI applications, contributing an approach to designing malleable software.

【49】Designing AI Peers for Collaborative Mathematical Problem Solving with Middle School Students: A Participatory Design Study
- **标题**: 设计人工智能同伴与中学生协作解决数学问题：一项参与式设计研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17962
> **作者**: Wenhan Lyu,Yimeng Wang,Murong Yue,Yifan Sun,Jennifer Suh,Meredith Kier,Ziyu Yao,Yixuan Zhang
> **摘要**: 协作解决问题（CPS）是中学数学教育的基本实践；然而，如果没有老师的持续支持，学生团体经常陷入停滞或挣扎。最近的工作探索了如何设计生成式人工智能工具来支持一对一辅导，但人们对如何将人工智能设计为协作学习环境中的同伴学习伙伴知之甚少。我们对 24 名中学生进行了参与式设计研究，他们首先在技术探索中与 AI 同伴一起参与数学 CPS 任务，然后协作设计他们理想的 AI 同伴。我们的研究结果表明，学生们认为人工智能同伴在数学上有能力，但又明显地恭顺，在学生明确的控制下提供渐进的支架，例如提示和检查。学生们更喜欢友好专业的语气，而不是夸张的人物形象。我们还讨论了设计建议以及对中学数学 CPS 中人工智能同行的影响。
> **Abstract**: Collaborative problem solving (CPS) is a fundamental practice in middle-school mathematics education; however, student groups frequently stall or struggle without ongoing teacher support. Recent work has explored how Generative AI tools can be designed to support one-on-one tutoring, but little is known about how AI can be designed as peer learning partners in collaborative learning contexts. We conducted a participatory design study with 24 middle school students, who first engaged in mathematics CPS tasks with AI peers in a technology probe, and then collaboratively designed their ideal AI peer. Our findings reveal that students envision an AI peer as competent in mathematics yet explicitly deferential, providing progressive scaffolds such as hints and checks under clear student control. Students preferred a tone of friendly expertise over exaggerated personas. We also discuss design recommendations and implications for AI peers in middle school mathematics CPS.

【50】"I use ChatGPT to humanize my words": Affordances and Risks of ChatGPT to Autistic Users
- **标题**: “我使用 ChatGPT 使我的言语变得人性化”：ChatGPT 对自闭症用户的可供性和风险
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17946
> **作者**: Renkai Ma,Ben Z. Zhang,Chen Chen,Fan Yang,Xiaoshan Huang,Haolun Wu,Lingyao Li
> **摘要**: 像 ChatGPT 这样的大型语言模型 (LLM) 聊天机器人已经成为自闭症用户的认知支架，但其效用和风险之间的紧张关系仍然没有得到充分阐明。通过对自我认定的自闭症用户发布的 3,984 条社交媒体帖子进行归纳主题分析，我们应用技术可供性框架来检验这种二元性。我们发现，虽然用户利用 ChatGPT 来缓解执行功能障碍、调节情绪、翻译神经典型的沟通并验证他们的自闭症身份，但这些可供性与重大风险并存：强化妄想思维、通过自动屏蔽抹去真实身份，以及引发与自闭症正义感的冲突。这张海报指出了自闭症用户与 ChatGPT 互动中的这些权衡，并概述了我们未来开发神经包容性技术的工作，这些技术通过有益的摩擦和双向翻译来解决这些紧张局势。
> **Abstract**: Large Language Model (LLM) chatbots like ChatGPT have emerged as cognitive scaffolding for autistic users, yet the tension between their utility and risk remains under-articulated. Through an inductive thematic analysis of 3,984 social media posts by self-identified autistic users, we apply the Technology Affordance framework to examine this duality. We found that while users leveraged ChatGPT to offload executive dysfunction, regulate emotions, translate neurotypical communication, and validate their autistic identity, these affordances coexist with significant risks: reinforcing delusional thinking, erasing authentic identity through automated masking, and triggering conflicts with the autistic sense of justice. This poster identifies these trade-offs in autistic users' interactions with ChatGPT and concludes by outlining our future work on developing neuro-inclusive technologies that address these tensions through beneficial friction and bidirectional translation.

【51】"Label from Somewhere": Reflexive Annotating for Situated AI Alignment
- **标题**: “来自某处的标签”：用于情境 AI 对齐的反射注释
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17937
> **作者**: Anne Arzberger,Celine Offerman,Ujwal Gadiraju,Alessandro Bozzon,Jie Yang
> **摘要**: 人工智能对齐依赖于注释者的判断，但注释管道通常将注释者视为可互换的，从而模糊了他们的社会地位如何影响注释。我们引入自反注释作为一种探针，邀请人群工作者反思他们的位置如何影响语言模型对齐上下文中的主观注释判断。通过对人群工作者 (N=30) 的定性研究和后续访谈 (N=5)，我们研究了我们的探针如何塑造注释者的行为、经验及其引发的情境元数据。我们发现，反射性注释通过引发交叉推理、表现出立场谦逊和推动观点改变，捕获了静态人口统计之外的认知元数据。至关重要的是，我们还指出了反射性参与和情感需求（例如情感暴露）之间的紧张关系。我们讨论了我们的工作对更丰富的价值启发和对齐实践的影响，这些实践将注释者的判断视为情境并有选择地整合位置元数据。
> **Abstract**: AI alignment relies on annotator judgments, yet annotation pipelines often treat annotators as interchangeable, obscuring how their social position shapes annotation. We introduce reflexive annotating as a probe that invites crowd workers to reflect on how their positionality informs subjective annotation judgments in a language model alignment context. Through a qualitative study with crowd workers (N=30) and follow-up interviews (N=5), we examine how our probe shapes annotators' behaviour, experience, and the situated metadata it elicits. We find that reflexive annotating captures epistemic metadata beyond static demographics by eliciting intersectional reasoning, surfacing positional humility, and nudging viewpoint change. Crucially, we also denote tensions between reflexive engagement and affective demands such as emotional exposure. We discuss the implications of our work for richer value elicitation and alignment practices that treat annotator judgments as situated and selectively integrate positional metadata.

【52】Investigating How Music Affects Persuasion, Engagement, and Emotion in Data Videos
- **标题**: 研究音乐如何影响数据视频中的说服力、参与度和情感
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17893
> **作者**: Sarmistha Sarna Gomasta,Mahmood Jasim,Hossein Hadisi,Yvonne Jansen,Pierre Dragicevic,Narges Mahyar,Ali Sarvghad
> **摘要**: 数据视频已成为向广大受众传达数据的重要载体，也是信息可视化的常见研究对象。其中许多视频都包含音乐，但音乐对人们体验数据视频的影响在很大程度上仍未被探索。我们对音乐在三个维度上的影响进行了预先注册的研究：说服力、参与度和情感。我们向在线参与者展示了一个现有的数据视频（1）没有任何音乐，（2）带有通用默认音乐，以及（3）由专业作曲家设计的自定义音乐。我们发现默认音乐有助于使数据视频更具说服力。然而，定制音乐的效果更加复杂，我们没有发现音乐可以增加参与度。此外，与我们的预期相反，我们的参与者在没有音乐的情况下表现出了更强烈的情绪。我们的研究为音乐和数据可视化的交叉提供了新的见解，是指导设计师创建有影响力的数据驱动叙事的第一步。
> **Abstract**: Data videos have become a prominent vessel for communicating data to broad audiences, and a common object of study in information visualization. Many of these videos include music, yet the impact of music on how people experience data videos remains largely unexplored. We conducted a preregistered study into the effect of music across three dimensions: persuasion, engagement, and emotion. We showed online participants an existing data video (1) without any music, (2) with its generic default music, and (3) with custom music designed by a professional composer. We found that the default music helped make the data video more persuasive. However, the effects of custom music were more mixed, and we did not find that music increased engagement. In addition, and contrary to our expectations, our participants reported more intense emotions without music. Our study contributes new insights into the intersection of music and data visualization and is a first step toward guiding designers in creating impactful data-driven narratives.

【53】Physiological and Behavioral Modeling of Stress and Cognitive Load in Web-Based Question Answering
- **标题**: 基于网络的问答中的压力和认知负荷的生理和行为建模
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17890
> **作者**: Ailin Liu,Francesco Chiossi,Felix Henninger,Lisa Bondo Andersen,Tobias Wistuba,Sonja Greven,Frauke Kreuter,Fiona Draxler
> **摘要**: 时间压力和问题难度可能会引发网络调查中的压力和认知超载，从而损害数据质量和用户体验。大多数压力检测方法都基于低分辨率的自我报告，这些方法不太适合捕捉短时间在线任务期间快速、即时的变化。为了解决这一差距，我们进行了 2x2 受试者内研究 (N = 29)，在基于网络的多项选择任务中控制问题难度和时间压力。参与者完成一般知识和认知问题，同时我们收集多模式数据：小鼠动态、眼动追踪、心电图和皮肤电活动。使用基于条件和自我报告的标签，我们使用统计和机器学习模型来模拟压力和问题难度。我们的结果显示了在很短的时间内明显的生理和行为模式。这项工作证明了在数字环境中快速检测认知情感状态的可行性，为更具适应性、道德性和用户意识的调查界面铺平了道路。
> **Abstract**: Time pressure and question difficulty can trigger stress and cognitive overload in web-based surveys, compromising data quality and user experience. Most stress detection methods are based on low-resolution self-reports, which are poorly suited for capturing fast, moment-to-moment changes during short online tasks. Addressing this gap, we conducted a 2x2 within-subjects study (N = 29), manipulating question difficulty and time pressure in a web-based multiple-choice task. Participants completed general knowledge and cognitive questions while we collected multimodal data: mouse dynamics, eye tracking, electrocardiogram, and electrodermal activity. Using condition-based and self-reported labels, we used statistical and machine learning models to model stress and question difficulty. Our results show distinct physiological and behavioral patterns within very short timeframes. This work demonstrates the feasibility of rapidly detecting cognitive-affective states in digital environments, paving the way for more adaptive, ethical, and user-aware survey interfaces.

【54】AI Personalization Paradox: Personalized AI Increases Superficial Engagement in Reading while Undermines Autonomy and Ownership in Writing
- **标题**: 人工智能个性化悖论：个性化人工智能增加了阅读的肤浅参与度，同时削弱了写作的自主性和所有权
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17846
> **作者**: Peinuan Qin,Chi-Lan Yang,Nattapat Boonprakong,Jingzhu Chen,Yugin Tan,Yi-Chieh Lee
> **摘要**: 人工智能辅助写作在使作家受益的同时，引发了人们对自主性和所有权的担忧。个性化被认为是一种有效的解决方案，但同时也冒着作家对人工智能和行为转变的依赖的风险。为了更好的个性化设计，现有的研究仅依赖于写作阶段的互动和信息；然而，很少有研究探讨阅读行为如何影响个性化写作。本研究调查了整合阅读亮点以实现个性化对人工智能辅助写作的影响。一项有 46 名参与者参与的受试者间研究表明，个性化条件鼓励参与者创作出更多亮点。然而，突显出人意料地从意义建构策略转变为“喂养人工智能”的工具性行为，导致对人工智能的严重依赖，以及作家自主感、主人翁感和自我信用感的下降。这些发现表明了人工智能辅助写作中的个性化风险，强调了个性化策略的重要性，并提供了设计启示。
> **Abstract**: AI-assisted writing raises concerns about autonomy and ownership when benefiting writers. Personalization has been proposed as an effective solution while also risking writers' reliance on AI and behavior shifting. For better personalization design, existing studies rely on interaction and information solely within the writing phase; however, few studies have examined how reading behaviors can inform personalized writing. This study investigates the effects of integrating reading highlights for personalization on AI-assisted writing. A between-subjects study with 46 participants revealed that the personalization condition encouraged participants to produce more highlights. However, highlighting unexpectedly shifted from a sense-making strategy to an instrumental act of "feeding the AI," leading to significant reliance on AI and declines in writers' sense of autonomy, ownership, and self-credit. These findings indicate personalization risks in AI-assisted writing, emphasize the importance of personalization strategies, and provide design implications.

【55】Are we collaborative yet? A Usability Perspective on Mixnet Latency for Real-Time Applications
- **标题**: 我们合作了吗？实时应用程序 Mixnet 延迟的可用性视角
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17845
> **作者**: Killian Davitt,Dan Ristea,Steven J. Murdoch
> **摘要**: Mixnet 网络故意引入额外的通信延迟以提供匿名性。最近的发展使混合网络能够将延迟从几小时缩短到几秒，同时保持相同水平的匿名性。因此，现在可以在混合网上进行实时通信。关于用户如何容忍不同级别的延迟的研究有限，并且尚不清楚 mixnet 运营商应选择什么延迟级别。之前关于延迟的研究不适用于这些“中延迟”混合网络场景。我们的论文首次测量了 mixnet 延迟下用户对实时应用程序的容忍度。我们设计了一个基于文本的协作测验系统来测试用户对延迟的反应，其中参与者与模拟的第二个用户协作完成一组问题任务。添加了不同级别的延迟，类似于现代 mixnet 系统。我们表明，1 秒和 4 秒的平均延迟参数可以保持可用性，7 秒的平均延迟显示出一些困难，10 秒的平均延迟对用户体验不利。使用这些延迟参数，mixnet 运营商可以确保大多数类型的实时通信应用程序可用。因此，混合网可以平衡可用性和匿名性，而不会影响任何一个。
> **Abstract**: Mixnet networks deliberately induce additional latency to communications to provide anonymity. Recent developments have allowed mixnets to reduce their latency from hours to seconds while maintaining the same level of anonymity. As a result, real-time communications are now possible on mixnets. There has been limited research on how users tolerate different levels of delay, and it is unclear what latency levels mixnet operators should choose. Previous studies about latency do not apply to these 'mid-latency' mixnet scenarios. Our paper contributes the first measurement of users' tolerance to real-time applications under mixnet delay. We design a text-based collaborative quiz system to test user response to latency where participants complete a set of question tasks in collaboration with a simulated second user. Different levels of latency are added, analogous to a modern mixnet system. We show that average delay parameters of 1s and 4s maintain usability, a mean delay of 7s shows some difficulty and a mean delay of 10s is detrimental to user experience. Using these delay parameters, mixnet operators can ensure that most types of real-time communication applications are usable. Mixnets thus can balance usability and anonymity without compromising either.

## 信息检索(cs.IR:Information Retrieval)

【1】LLM-Enhanced Reinforcement Learning for Long-Term User Satisfaction in Interactive Recommendation
- **标题**: 法学硕士增强强化学习在交互式推荐中实现长期用户满意度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19585
> **作者**: Chongjun Xia,Yanchun Peng,Xianzhi Wang
> **摘要**: 交互式推荐系统可以动态适应用户反馈，但由于过度拟合短期用户偏好，常常会出现内容同质性和过滤气泡效应。虽然最近的努力旨在提高内容多样性，但它们主要在静态或一次性设置中运行，忽略了用户兴趣的长期演变。强化学习提供了一个原则框架，通过对顺序决策过程进行建模来优化长期用户满意度。然而，其在推荐中的应用受到稀疏、长尾的用户-项目交互和有限的语义规划能力的阻碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LLM 增强强化学习（LERL），这是一种新颖的分层推荐框架，它将 LLM 的语义规划能力与 RL 的细粒度适应性相结合。 LERL 由一个基于 LLM 的高级规划器（选择语义上不同的内容类别）和一个低级 RL 策略（在所选语义空间内推荐个性化项目）组成。这种分层设计缩小了行动空间，提高了规划效率，并减少了冗余内容的过度暴露。对现实世界数据集的大量实验表明，与最先进的基线相比，LERL 显着提高了长期用户满意度。 LERL 的实现可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/code3-18D3/ 上找到。
> **Abstract**: Interactive recommender systems can dynamically adapt to user feedback, but often suffer from content homogeneity and filter bubble effects due to overfitting short-term user preferences. While recent efforts aim to improve content diversity, they predominantly operate in static or one-shot settings, neglecting the long-term evolution of user interests. Reinforcement learning provides a principled framework for optimizing long-term user satisfaction by modeling sequential decision-making processes. However, its application in recommendation is hindered by sparse, long-tailed user-item interactions and limited semantic planning capabilities. In this work, we propose LLM-Enhanced Reinforcement Learning (LERL), a novel hierarchical recommendation framework that integrates the semantic planning power of LLM with the fine-grained adaptability of RL. LERL consists of a high-level LLM-based planner that selects semantically diverse content categories, and a low-level RL policy that recommends personalized items within the selected semantic space. This hierarchical design narrows the action space, enhances planning efficiency, and mitigates overexposure to redundant content. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that LERL significantly improves long-term user satisfaction when compared with state-of-the-art baselines. The implementation of LERL is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/code3-18D3/.

【2】Talos: Optimizing Top-$K$ Accuracy in Recommender Systems
- **标题**: Talos：优化推荐系统中的 Top-K$ 准确性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19276
> **作者**: Shengjia Zhang,Weiqin Yang,Jiawei Chen,Peng Wu,Yuegang Sun,Gang Wang,Qihao Shi,Can Wang
> **摘要**: 推荐系统（RS）旨在检索最符合个人用户偏好的一小组项目。当然，RS 主要强调 Top-$K$ 结果的质量，而不是整个项目集的性能。然而，估计 Top-$K$ 准确度（例如 Precision@$K$、Recall@$K$）需要确定项目的排名位置，这会带来大量的计算开销，并对优化提出重大挑战。此外，由于用户偏好或数据偏差的变化，RS 经常会遭受分布变化，从而使任务进一步复杂化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Talos，这是一种专门用于优化 Talos 推荐准确性的损失函数。 Talos 利用分位数技术，将复杂的排名相关操作替换为预测分数和学习分数阈值之间更简单的比较。我们进一步开发了一种基于采样的回归算法，用于高效、准确的阈值估计，并引入约束项以通过防止分数膨胀来保持优化稳定性。此外，我们还采用了定制的代理函数来解决不连续性并增强针对分布变化的鲁棒性。进行了全面的理论分析和实证实验来证明 Talos 的有效性、效率、收敛性和分布鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/cynthia-shengjia/WWW-2026-Talos 获取。
> **Abstract**: Recommender systems (RS) aim to retrieve a small set of items that best match individual user preferences. Naturally, RS place primary emphasis on the quality of the Top-$K$ results rather than performance across the entire item set. However, estimating Top-$K$ accuracy (e.g., Precision@$K$, Recall@$K$) requires determining the ranking positions of items, which imposes substantial computational overhead and poses significant challenges for optimization. In addition, RS often suffer from distribution shifts due to evolving user preferences or data biases, further complicating the task. To address these issues, we propose Talos, a loss function that is specifically designed to optimize the Talos recommendation accuracy. Talos leverages a quantile technique that replaces the complex ranking-dependent operations into simpler comparisons between predicted scores and learned score thresholds. We further develop a sampling-based regression algorithm for efficient and accurate threshold estimation, and introduce a constraint term to maintain optimization stability by preventing score inflation. Additionally, we incorporate a tailored surrogate function to address discontinuity and enhance robustness against distribution shifts. Comprehensive theoretical analyzes and empirical experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency, convergence, and distributional robustness of Talos. The code is available at https://github.com/cynthia-shengjia/WWW-2026-Talos.

【3】HELM: A Human-Centered Evaluation Framework for LLM-Powered Recommender Systems
- **标题**: HELM：以人为本的 LLM 支持的推荐系统评估框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19197
> **作者**: Sushant Mehta
> **摘要**: 将大型语言模型 (LLM) 集成到推荐系统中，为自然语言理解、解释生成和对话交互引入了前所未有的功能。然而，现有的评估方法主要关注传统的准确性指标，未能捕捉到决定现实世界用户体验的以人为本的多方面品质。我们引入\framework{}（\textbf{H}以人为中心的\textbf{E}评估\textbf{L}LM驱动的reco\textbf{M}menders），这是一个全面的评估框架，系统地评估LLM驱动的推荐系统跨越五个以人为中心的维度：\textit{意图对齐}，\textit{解释质量}，\textit{交互自然性}，\textit{信任\&透明度}和\textit{公平\&多样性}。通过涉及三个领域（电影、书籍和餐厅）的三个最先进的基于 LLM 的推荐器（GPT-4、LLaMA-3.1 和 P5）的广泛实验，以及 12 位领域专家使用 847 个推荐场景的严格评估，我们证明了\framework{}揭示了传统指标无法看到的关键质量维度。我们的结果表明，虽然 GPT-4 实现了卓越的解释质量 (4.21/5.0) 和交互自然度 (4.35/5.0)，但与传统的协同过滤 (0.58) 相比，它表现出显着的流行度偏差 (基尼系数 0.73)。我们发布 \framework{} 作为开源工具包，以推进推荐系统社区中以人为本的评估实践。
> **Abstract**: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into recommendation systems has introduced unprecedented capabilities for natural language understanding, explanation generation, and conversational interactions. However, existing evaluation methodologies focus predominantly on traditional accuracy metrics, failing to capture the multifaceted human-centered qualities that determine the real-world user experience. We introduce \framework{} (\textbf{H}uman-centered \textbf{E}valuation for \textbf{L}LM-powered reco\textbf{M}menders), a comprehensive evaluation framework that systematically assesses LLM-powered recommender systems across five human-centered dimensions: \textit{Intent Alignment}, \textit{Explanation Quality}, \textit{Interaction Naturalness}, \textit{Trust \& Transparency}, and \textit{Fairness \& Diversity}. Through extensive experiments involving three state-of-the-art LLM-based recommenders (GPT-4, LLaMA-3.1, and P5) across three domains (movies, books, and restaurants), and rigorous evaluation by 12 domain experts using 847 recommendation scenarios, we demonstrate that \framework{} reveals critical quality dimensions invisible to traditional metrics. Our results show that while GPT-4 achieves superior explanation quality (4.21/5.0) and interaction naturalness (4.35/5.0), it exhibits a significant popularity bias (Gini coefficient 0.73) compared to traditional collaborative filtering (0.58). We release \framework{} as an open-source toolkit to advance human-centered evaluation practices in the recommender systems community.

【4】LLMs as Orchestrators: Constraint-Compliant Multi-Agent Optimization for Recommendation Systems
- **标题**: 法学硕士作为协调者：推荐系统的符合约束的多代理优化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19121
> **作者**: Guilin Zhang,Kai Zhao,Jeffrey Friedman,Xu Chu
> **摘要**: 推荐系统必须优化多个目标，同时满足公平性和覆盖范围等严格的业务约束。例如，电商平台可能要求每个推荐列表都包含多个卖家的商品以及至少一个新上架的产品；在生产中违反此类限制（即使是一次）也是不可接受的。先前关于多目标推荐的工作和最近基于 LLM 的推荐代理主要将约束视为软惩罚或专注于项目评分和交互，导致现实世界部署中频繁违规。如何利用法学硕士来协调推荐系统中的约束优化仍有待探索。我们提出了 DualAgent-Rec，这是一个 LLM 协调的双代理框架，用于约束多目标电子商务推荐。该框架将优化分为在硬约束下优先考虑准确性的开发代理和通过无约束帕累托搜索促进多样性的探索代理。基于 LLM 的协调器根据优化进度和约束满足情况在代理之间自适应分配资源，而自适应 epsilon 松弛机制保证最终解决方案的可行性。 Amazon Reviews 2023 数据集上的实验表明，DualAgent-Rec 实现了 100% 的约束满足，并将帕累托超体积比强基线提高了 4-6%，同时保持有竞争力的准确性与多样性权衡。这些结果表明，LLM 可以充当可部署且符合约束的推荐系统的有效编排代理。
> **Abstract**: Recommendation systems must optimize multiple objectives while satisfying hard business constraints such as fairness and coverage. For example, an e-commerce platform may require every recommendation list to include items from multiple sellers and at least one newly listed product; violating such constraints--even once--is unacceptable in production. Prior work on multi-objective recommendation and recent LLM-based recommender agents largely treat constraints as soft penalties or focus on item scoring and interaction, leading to frequent violations in real-world deployments. How to leverage LLMs for coordinating constrained optimization in recommendation systems remains underexplored. We propose DualAgent-Rec, an LLM-coordinated dual-agent framework for constrained multi-objective e-commerce recommendation. The framework separates optimization into an Exploitation Agent that prioritizes accuracy under hard constraints and an Exploration Agent that promotes diversity through unconstrained Pareto search. An LLM-based coordinator adaptively allocates resources between agents based on optimization progress and constraint satisfaction, while an adaptive epsilon-relaxation mechanism guarantees feasibility of final solutions. Experiments on the Amazon Reviews 2023 dataset demonstrate that DualAgent-Rec achieves 100% constraint satisfaction and improves Pareto hypervolume by 4-6% over strong baselines, while maintaining competitive accuracy-diversity trade-offs. These results indicate that LLMs can act as effective orchestration agents for deployable and constraint-compliant recommendation systems.

【5】RobustExplain: Evaluating Robustness of LLM-Based Explanation Agents for Recommendation
- **标题**: RobustExplain：评估基于 LLM 的推荐解释代理的稳健性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19120
> **作者**: Guilin Zhang,Kai Zhao,Jeffrey Friedman,Xu Chu
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 越来越多地用于在推荐系统中生成自然语言解释，充当对用户行为历史进行推理的解释代理。虽然之前的工作主要集中在固定输入下的解释流畅性和相关性，但法学硕士生成的对现实用户行为噪声的解释的稳健性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在现实世界的网络平台中，由于意外点击、时间不一致、缺失值和不断变化的偏好，交互历史本质上是嘈杂的，引发了对解释稳定性和用户信任的担忧。我们提出了 RobustExplain，这是第一个用于衡量 LLM 生成的推荐解释的稳健性的系统评估框架。 RobustExplain 引入了跨多个严重级别评估的五种真实用户行为扰动，以及捕获语义、关键字、结构和长度一致性的多维鲁棒性指标。我们的目标是建立一个有原则的任务级评估框架和初始稳健性基线，而不是提供涵盖所有可用法学硕士的全面排行榜。对四个代表性法学硕士 (7B--70B) 的实验表明，当前模型仅表现出中等稳健性，较大的模型可实现高达 8% 的稳定性。我们的结果为解释代理建立了第一个稳健性基准，并强调稳健性是网络规模上值得信赖、代理驱动的推荐系统的一个关键维度。
> **Abstract**: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate natural-language explanations in recommender systems, acting as explanation agents that reason over user behavior histories. While prior work has focused on explanation fluency and relevance under fixed inputs, the robustness of LLM-generated explanations to realistic user behavior noise remains largely unexplored. In real-world web platforms, interaction histories are inherently noisy due to accidental clicks, temporal inconsistencies, missing values, and evolving preferences, raising concerns about explanation stability and user trust. We present RobustExplain, the first systematic evaluation framework for measuring the robustness of LLM-generated recommendation explanations. RobustExplain introduces five realistic user behavior perturbations evaluated across multiple severity levels and a multi-dimensional robustness metric capturing semantic, keyword, structural, and length consistency. Our goal is to establish a principled, task-level evaluation framework and initial robustness baselines, rather than to provide a comprehensive leaderboard across all available LLMs. Experiments on four representative LLMs (7B--70B) show that current models exhibit only moderate robustness, with larger models achieving up to 8% higher stability. Our results establish the first robustness benchmarks for explanation agents and highlight robustness as a critical dimension for trustworthy, agent-driven recommender systems at web scale.

【6】Capturing P: On the Expressive Power and Efficient Evaluation of Boolean Retrieval
- **标题**: 捕获P：论布尔检索的表达力和高效评估
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18747
> **作者**: Amir Aavani
> **摘要**: 现代信息检索正在从简单的文档过滤过渡到复杂的神经符号推理工作流程。然而，当前的检索架构在处理这种新范式所需的严格逻辑和算术约束时面临着根本的效率困境。标准的基于迭代器的引擎（Document-at-a-Time）本身不支持复杂的嵌套逻辑图；强迫它们执行此类查询通常会导致难以处理的运行时性能。相反，朴素的递归方法（Term-at-a-Time）虽然能够支持这些结构，但在强制执行广泛的逻辑排除时会遭受过高的内存消耗。在本文中，我们建议检索引擎必须能够“捕获$\mathbf{P}$”——以计算有效的方式直接在其索引上评估任何多项式时间属性。我们定义了一种基于有向无环图（DAG）的正式检索语言（$\mathcal{L}_R$），并证明它精确地捕获了复杂性类$\mathbf{P}$。我们引入 \texttt{ComputePN}，一种新颖的评估算法，使 $\mathcal{L}_R$ 易于处理。通过将本机 DAG 遍历与内存高效的“正负”响应机制相结合，\texttt{ComputePN} 确保有效评估 $\mathcal{L}_R$ 中的任何查询。这项工作为将搜索索引转变为通用计算引擎奠定了理论基础。
> **Abstract**: Modern information retrieval is transitioning from simple document filtering to complex, neuro-symbolic reasoning workflows. However, current retrieval architectures face a fundamental efficiency dilemma when handling the rigorous logical and arithmetic constraints required by this new paradigm. Standard iterator-based engines (Document-at-a-Time) do not natively support complex, nested logic graphs; forcing them to execute such queries typically results in intractable runtime performance. Conversely, naive recursive approaches (Term-at-a-Time), while capable of supporting these structures, suffer from prohibitive memory consumption when enforcing broad logical exclusions. In this paper, we propose that a retrieval engine must be capable of ``Capturing $\mathbf{P}$'' -- evaluating any polynomial-time property directly over its index in a computationally efficient manner. We define a formal Retrieval Language ($\mathcal{L}_R$) based on Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and prove it precisely captures the complexity class $\mathbf{P}$. We introduce \texttt{ComputePN}, a novel evaluation algorithm that makes $\mathcal{L}_R$ tractable. By combining native DAG traversal with a memory-efficient ``Positive-Negative'' response mechanism, \texttt{ComputePN} ensures the efficient evaluation of any query in $\mathcal{L}_R$. This work establishes the theoretical foundation for turning the search index into a general-purpose computational engine.

【7】FastInsight: Fast and Insightful Retrieval via Fusion Operators for Graph RAG
- **标题**: FastInsight：通过图 RAG 的融合运算符进行快速、有洞察力的检索
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18579
> **作者**: Seonho An,Chaejeong Hyun,Min-Soo Kim
> **摘要**: 旨在对语料库图进行深入检索的现有图 RAG 方法通常依赖于交错大语言模型 (LLM) 推理的时间密集型过程。为了实现省时高效的洞察检索，我们提出了 FastInsight。我们首先引入图检索分类法，将现有方法分为三个基本操作：向量搜索、图搜索和基于模型的搜索。通过这种分类法，我们确定了当前方法中的两个关键局限性：基于模型的搜索的拓扑盲性和图搜索的语义盲性。 FastInsight 通过交织两个新颖的融合算子克服了这些限制：基于图的重排序器 (GRanker)（用作基于图模型的搜索）和语义拓扑扩展 (STeX)（用作矢量图搜索）。对广泛的检索和生成数据集的大量实验表明，与最先进的基线相比，FastInsight 显着提高了检索准确性和生成质量，在有效性和效率之间的权衡中实现了实质性的帕累托改进。
> **Abstract**: Existing Graph RAG methods aiming for insightful retrieval on corpus graphs typically rely on time-intensive processes that interleave Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning. To enable time-efficient insightful retrieval, we propose FastInsight. We first introduce a graph retrieval taxonomy that categorizes existing methods into three fundamental operations: vector search, graph search, and model-based search. Through this taxonomy, we identify two critical limitations in current approaches: the topology-blindness of model-based search and the semantics-blindness of graph search. FastInsight overcomes these limitations by interleaving two novel fusion operators: the Graph-based Reranker (GRanker), which functions as a graph model-based search, and Semantic-Topological eXpansion (STeX), which operates as a vector-graph search. Extensive experiments on broad retrieval and generation datasets demonstrate that FastInsight significantly improves both retrieval accuracy and generation quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a substantial Pareto improvement in the trade-off between effectiveness and efficiency.

## 机器学习(cs.LG:Machine Learning)

【1】Out-of-Distribution Generalization via Invariant Trajectories for Multimodal Large Language Model Editing
- **标题**: 通过不变轨迹的分布外泛化用于多模态大语言模型编辑
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19700
> **作者**: Jiajie Su,Haoyuan Wang,Xiaohua Feng,Yunshan Ma,Xiaobo Xia,Yuyuan Li,Xiaolin Zheng,Jianmao Xiao,Chaochao Chen
> **摘要**: 知识编辑成为有效纠正大型语言模型（LLM）中不正确或过时知识的关键技术。单模态 LLM 的现有编辑方法依赖于严格的参数到输出映射，这会导致多模态 LLM (MLLM) 的级联推理中出现因果欠拟合和因果过拟合。在本文中，我们将 MLLM 编辑重新表述为分布外 (OOD) 泛化问题，其目标是辨别语义转变与事实转变，从而在不同的跨模式提示中实现稳健的编辑。该 OOD 问题的关键挑战在于识别不变的因果轨迹，这些轨迹可以准确地概括，同时抑制虚假相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ODEdit，一种基于即插即用不变学习的框架，它优化了三方 OOD 风险目标，同时增强编辑可靠性、局部性和通用性。我们进一步引入了一种编辑轨迹不变学习方法，它将总变异惩罚集成到风险最小化目标中，以稳定编辑轨迹以应对环境变化。理论分析和大量实验证明了 ODEdit 的有效性。
> **Abstract**: Knowledge editing emerges as a crucial technique for efficiently correcting incorrect or outdated knowledge in large language models (LLM). Existing editing methods for unimodal LLM rely on a rigid parameter-to-output mapping, which causes causal-underfit and causal-overfit in cascaded reasoning for Multimodal LLM (MLLM). In this paper, we reformulate MLLM editing as an out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization problem, where the goal is to discern semantic shift with factual shift and thus achieve robust editing among diverse cross-modal prompting. The key challenge of this OOD problem lies in identifying invariant causal trajectories that generalize accurately while suppressing spurious correlations. To address it, we propose ODEdit, a plug-and-play invariant learning based framework that optimizes the tripartite OOD risk objective to simultaneously enhance editing reliability, locality, and generality.We further introduce an edit trajectory invariant learning method, which integrates a total variation penalty into the risk minimization objective to stabilize edit trajectories against environmental variations. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ODEdit.

【2】Cross-Domain Offshore Wind Power Forecasting: Transfer Learning Through Meteorological Clusters
- **标题**: 跨域海上风电预测：通过气象集群进行迁移学习
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19674
> **作者**: Dominic Weisser,Chloé Hashimoto-Cullen,Benjamin Guedj
> **摘要**: 雄心勃勃的脱碳目标正在促进新海上风电场订单的增长。为了让这些新投产的工厂运行，从一开始就需要准确的电力预测。这些可以实现电网稳定性、良好的储备管理和高效的能源交易。尽管机器学习模型具有强大的性能，但它们往往需要大量特定地点的数据，而新农场尚不具备这些数据。为了克服这种数据稀缺的问题，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习框架，该框架根据协变量气象特征对功率输出进行聚类。因此，我们不是训练单个通用模型，而是使用一组专家模型进行预测，每个模型都在一个集群上进行训练。由于这些预先训练的模型各自专门针对不同的天气模式，因此它们可以有效地适应新地点并捕获可转移的、依赖于气候的动态。通过专家模型对季节和气象变化的内置校准，我们消除了一年以上本地测量的行业标准要求。我们的贡献有两个方面——我们提出了这个新颖的框架，并在八个海上风电场对其进行了全面评估，利用不到五个月的特定地点数据实现了准确的跨域预测。我们的实验实现了 3.52% 的 MAE，提供了经验验证，可靠的预测不需要完整的年度周期。除了功率预测之外，这种气候感知的迁移学习方法还为海上风电应用（例如早期风力资源评估）开辟了新的机遇，其中减少数据需求可以显着加快项目开发，同时有效降低其固有风险。
> **Abstract**: Ambitious decarbonisation targets are catalysing growth in orders of new offshore wind farms. For these newly commissioned plants to run, accurate power forecasts are needed from the onset. These allow grid stability, good reserve management and efficient energy trading. Despite machine learning models having strong performances, they tend to require large volumes of site-specific data that new farms do not yet have. To overcome this data scarcity, we propose a novel transfer learning framework that clusters power output according to covariate meteorological features. Rather than training a single, general-purpose model, we thus forecast with an ensemble of expert models, each trained on a cluster. As these pre-trained models each specialise in a distinct weather pattern, they adapt efficiently to new sites and capture transferable, climate-dependent dynamics. Through the expert models' built-in calibration to seasonal and meteorological variability, we remove the industry-standard requirement of local measurements over a year. Our contributions are two-fold - we propose this novel framework and comprehensively evaluate it on eight offshore wind farms, achieving accurate cross-domain forecasting with under five months of site-specific data. Our experiments achieve a MAE of 3.52\%, providing empirical verification that reliable forecasts do not require a full annual cycle. Beyond power forecasting, this climate-aware transfer learning method opens new opportunities for offshore wind applications such as early-stage wind resource assessment, where reducing data requirements can significantly accelerate project development whilst effectively mitigating its inherent risks.

【3】ProToken: Token-Level Attribution for Federated Large Language Models
- **标题**: ProToken：联合大型语言模型的令牌级归因
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19672
> **作者**: Waris Gill,Ahmad Humayun,Ali Anwar,Muhammad Ali Gulzar
> **摘要**: 联合学习 (FL) 支持跨分布式数据源的大型语言模型 (LLM) 协作训练，同时保护隐私。然而，当联合 LLM 部署在关键应用程序中时，仍不清楚哪些客户端促成了特定的生成响应，从而阻碍了调试、恶意客户端识别、公平奖励分配和信任验证。我们提出了 ProToken，这是一种用于联合法学硕士中令牌级归因的新颖来源方法，可解决自回归文本生成过程中的客户归因问题，同时保持 FL 隐私约束。 ProToken 利用两个关键的见解来实现每个令牌的来源：（1）变压器架构将特定于任务的信号集中在后面的块中，从而实现计算易处理性的战略层选择，以及（2）基于梯度的相关权重过滤掉不相关的神经激活，将归因集中在直接影响令牌生成的神经元上。我们评估了涵盖四个 LLM 架构（Gemma、Llama、Qwen、SmolLM）和四个领域（医学、金融、数学、编码）的 16 种配置的 ProToken。 ProToken 在正确定位负责任的客户端方面实现了 98% 的平均归因准确度，并在扩大客户端数量时保持高精度，验证了其在实际部署设置中的实际可行性。
> **Abstract**: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative training of Large Language Models (LLMs) across distributed data sources while preserving privacy. However, when federated LLMs are deployed in critical applications, it remains unclear which client(s) contributed to specific generated responses, hindering debugging, malicious client identification, fair reward allocation, and trust verification. We present ProToken, a novel Provenance methodology for Token-level attribution in federated LLMs that addresses client attribution during autoregressive text generation while maintaining FL privacy constraints. ProToken leverages two key insights to enable provenance at each token: (1) transformer architectures concentrate task-specific signals in later blocks, enabling strategic layer selection for computational tractability, and (2) gradient-based relevance weighting filters out irrelevant neural activations, focusing attribution on neurons that directly influence token generation. We evaluate ProToken across 16 configurations spanning four LLM architectures (Gemma, Llama, Qwen, SmolLM) and four domains (medical, financial, mathematical, coding). ProToken achieves 98% average attribution accuracy in correctly localizing responsible client(s), and maintains high accuracy when the number of clients are scaled, validating its practical viability for real-world deployment settings.

【4】Tracking Drift: Variation-Aware Entropy Scheduling for Non-Stationary Reinforcement Learning
- **标题**: 跟踪漂移：非平稳强化学习的变化感知熵调度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19624
> **作者**: Tongxi Wang,Zhuoyang Xia,Xinran Chen,Shan Liu
> **摘要**: 现实世界中的强化学习经常面临环境漂移，但大多数现有方法依赖于静态熵系数/目标熵，导致稳定期间的过度探索和漂移后的探索不足（从而恢复缓慢），并且没有回答探索强度如何随漂移幅度变化的原则性问题。我们证明，非平稳性下的熵调度可以简化为一维、逐轮权衡，在环境稳定时更快地跟踪漂移后的最优解与避免无端随机性，因此探索强度可以由可测量的在线漂移信号驱动。在此基础上，我们提出了 AES（自适应熵调度），它在训练期间使用可观察到的漂移代理在线自适应地调整熵系数/温度，几乎不需要结构变化，并且产生的开销最小。在 4 种算法变体、12 种任务和 4 种漂移模式中，AES 显着减少了由漂移引起的性能下降部分，并加速了突然变化后的恢复。
> **Abstract**: Real-world reinforcement learning often faces environment drift, but most existing methods rely on static entropy coefficients/target entropy, causing over-exploration during stable periods and under-exploration after drift (thus slow recovery), and leaving unanswered the principled question of how exploration intensity should scale with drift magnitude. We prove that entropy scheduling under non-stationarity can be reduced to a one-dimensional, round-by-round trade-off, faster tracking of the optimal solution after drift vs. avoiding gratuitous randomness when the environment is stable, so exploration strength can be driven by measurable online drift signals. Building on this, we propose AES (Adaptive Entropy Scheduling), which adaptively adjusts the entropy coefficient/temperature online using observable drift proxies during training, requiring almost no structural changes and incurring minimal overhead. Across 4 algorithm variants, 12 tasks, and 4 drift modes, AES significantly reduces the fraction of performance degradation caused by drift and accelerates recovery after abrupt changes.

【5】R^3: Replay, Reflection, and Ranking Rewards for LLM Reinforcement Learning
- **标题**: R^3：LLM强化学习的重播、反思和排名奖励
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19620
> **作者**: Zhizheng Jiang,Kang Zhao,Weikai Xu,Xinkui Lin,Wei Liu,Jian Luan,Shuo Shang,Peng Han
> **摘要**: 大型推理模型（LRM）旨在通过结构化推理解决多样化且复杂的问题。基于组的策略优化方法的最新进展显示出在不依赖进程级注释的情况下实现稳定优势估计的前景。然而，这些方法依赖于同一批次内高质量样本引起的优势差距，这使得当组内优势在挑战性任务下崩溃时，训练过程变得脆弱且低效。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 \emph{\textbf{R^3}} 的强化学习机制，该机制沿着三个方向：（1）\emph{跨上下文 \underline{\textbf{R}}eplay} 策略，通过回忆同一查询的历史轨迹中有价值的示例来保持组内优势，（2）\emph{in-context self-\underline{\textbf{R}}eflection} 机制使模型能够通过利用过去的失败来优化输出，以及（3）一个\emph{结构熵\underline{\textbf{R}}anking奖励}，它通过根据令牌级熵模式对响应进行排名来为截断或失败的样本分配相对奖励，捕获局部探索和全局稳定性。我们在 Deepseek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B 上实现我们的方法，并在数学领域的 DeepscaleR-40k 上对其进行训练。实验表明，我们的方法在多个数学基准上实现了 SoTA 性能，这代表了基础模型的显着改进和更少的推理标记。代码和模型将被发布。
> **Abstract**: Large reasoning models (LRMs) aim to solve diverse and complex problems through structured reasoning. Recent advances in group-based policy optimization methods have shown promise in enabling stable advantage estimation without reliance on process-level annotations. However, these methods rely on advantage gaps induced by high-quality samples within the same batch, which makes the training process fragile and inefficient when intra-group advantages collapse under challenging tasks. To address these problems, we propose a reinforcement learning mechanism named \emph{\textbf{R^3}} that along three directions: (1) a \emph{cross-context \underline{\textbf{R}}eplay} strategy that maintains the intra-group advantage by recalling valuable examples from historical trajectories of the same query, (2) an \emph{in-context self-\underline{\textbf{R}}eflection} mechanism enabling models to refine outputs by leveraging past failures, and (3) a \emph{structural entropy \underline{\textbf{R}}anking reward}, which assigns relative rewards to truncated or failed samples by ranking responses based on token-level entropy patterns, capturing both local exploration and global stability. We implement our method on Deepseek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B and train it on the DeepscaleR-40k in the math domain. Experiments demonstrate our method achieves SoTA performance on several math benchmarks, representing significant improvements and fewer reasoning tokens over the base models. Code and model will be released.

【6】Safe Exploration via Policy Priors
- **标题**: 通过策略先验进行安全探索
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19612
> **作者**: Manuel Wendl,Yarden As,Manish Prajapat,Anton Pollak,Stelian Coros,Andreas Krause
> **摘要**: 安全探索是强化学习（RL）智能体在受控（例如模拟）环境之外在线学习和适应的关键要求。在这项工作中，我们通过利用次优但保守的策略（例如，从离线数据或模拟器获得）作为先验来应对这一挑战。我们的方法 SOOPER 使用概率动力学模型进行乐观探索，但如果需要，则悲观地回退到保守政策。我们证明 SOOPER 保证了整个学习过程中的安全，并通过限制其累积遗憾来收敛到最优策略。对关键安全 RL 基准和实际硬件的大量实验表明，SOOPER 具有可扩展性，优于最先进的技术，并在实践中验证了我们的理论保证。
> **Abstract**: Safe exploration is a key requirement for reinforcement learning (RL) agents to learn and adapt online, beyond controlled (e.g. simulated) environments. In this work, we tackle this challenge by utilizing suboptimal yet conservative policies (e.g., obtained from offline data or simulators) as priors. Our approach, SOOPER, uses probabilistic dynamics models to optimistically explore, yet pessimistically fall back to the conservative policy prior if needed. We prove that SOOPER guarantees safety throughout learning, and establish convergence to an optimal policy by bounding its cumulative regret. Extensive experiments on key safe RL benchmarks and real-world hardware demonstrate that SOOPER is scalable, outperforms the state-of-the-art and validate our theoretical guarantees in practice.

【7】Explicit Multi-head Attention for Inter-head Interaction in Large Language Models
- **标题**: 大型语言模型中头部间交互的显式多头注意力
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19611
> **作者**: Runyu Peng,Yunhua Zhou,Demin Song,Kai Lv,Bo Wang,Qipeng Guo,Xipeng Qiu
> **摘要**: 在基于 Transformer 架构构建的大型语言模型中，最近的研究表明头部间的交互可以增强注意力表现。受此启发，我们提出了多头显式注意力（MEA），这是一种简单而有效的注意力变体，可以显式地模拟跨头交互。 MEA 由两个关键组件组成：头级线性组合（HLC）模块，将可学习的线性组合单独应用于跨头的键和值向量，从而实现丰富的头间通信；以及头级组归一化层，用于对齐重组头的统计属性。 MEA 在预训练中表现出强大的鲁棒性，允许使用更大的学习率，从而加快收敛速度​​，最终降低验证损失并提高一系列任务的性能。此外，我们通过减少注意力头的数量并利用 HLC 使用低阶“虚拟头”重建它们来探索 MEA 的参数效率。这实现了实用的键值缓存压缩策略，可将 KV 缓存内存使用量减少 50%，而在知识密集型和科学推理任务上的性能损失可以忽略不计，并且对于奥林匹克级别的数学基准测试，准确度仅下降 3.59%。
> **Abstract**: In large language models built upon the Transformer architecture, recent studies have shown that inter-head interaction can enhance attention performance. Motivated by this, we propose Multi-head Explicit Attention (MEA), a simple yet effective attention variant that explicitly models cross-head interaction. MEA consists of two key components: a Head-level Linear Composition (HLC) module that separately applies learnable linear combinations to the key and value vectors across heads, thereby enabling rich inter-head communication; and a head-level Group Normalization layer that aligns the statistical properties of the recombined heads. MEA shows strong robustness in pretraining, which allows the use of larger learning rates that lead to faster convergence, ultimately resulting in lower validation loss and improved performance across a range of tasks. Furthermore, we explore the parameter efficiency of MEA by reducing the number of attention heads and leveraging HLC to reconstruct them using low-rank "virtual heads". This enables a practical key-value cache compression strategy that reduces KV-cache memory usage by 50% with negligible performance loss on knowledge-intensive and scientific reasoning tasks, and only a 3.59% accuracy drop for Olympiad-level mathematical benchmarks.

【8】Intersectional Fairness via Mixed-Integer Optimization
- **标题**: 通过混合整数优化实现交叉公平
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19595
> **作者**: Jiří Němeček,Mark Kozdoba,Illia Kryvoviaz,Tomáš Pevný,Jakub Mareček
> **摘要**: 人工智能在金融和医疗保健等高风险领域的部署需要公平和透明的模型。虽然包括欧盟人工智能法案在内的监管框架强制要求减少偏见，但它们故意对偏见的定义含糊其辞。根据现有研究，我们认为真正的公平需要解决受保护群体交叉点的偏见。我们提出了一个统一的框架，利用混合整数优化（MIO）来训练交叉公平且本质上可解释的分类器。我们证明了两种交叉公平性度量（MSD 和 SPSF）在检测最不公平子组方面的等效性，并凭经验证明我们基于 MIO 的算法提高了发现偏差的性能。我们训练高性能、可解释的分类器，将交叉偏差限制在可接受的阈值以下，为受监管行业及其他行业提供强大的解决方案。
> **Abstract**: The deployment of Artificial Intelligence in high-risk domains, such as finance and healthcare, necessitates models that are both fair and transparent. While regulatory frameworks, including the EU's AI Act, mandate bias mitigation, they are deliberately vague about the definition of bias. In line with existing research, we argue that true fairness requires addressing bias at the intersections of protected groups. We propose a unified framework that leverages Mixed-Integer Optimization (MIO) to train intersectionally fair and intrinsically interpretable classifiers. We prove the equivalence of two measures of intersectional fairness (MSD and SPSF) in detecting the most unfair subgroup and empirically demonstrate that our MIO-based algorithm improves performance in finding bias. We train high-performing, interpretable classifiers that bound intersectional bias below an acceptable threshold, offering a robust solution for regulated industries and beyond.

【9】From Atoms to Chains: Divergence-Guided Reasoning Curriculum for Unlabeled LLM Domain Adaptation
- **标题**: 从原子到链条：未标记 LLM 领域适应的发散引导推理课程
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19588
> **作者**: Yongqi Wang,Xiaofeng Ji,Jie Wang,Qingbin Li,Xiao Xiong,Zheming Yang,Jian Xu,Minghui Qiu,Xinxiao Wu
> **摘要**: 在没有人工注释数据的情况下将大型语言模型 (LLM) 应用于专业领域是一项至关重要但艰巨的挑战。广泛采用的知识蒸馏方法通常会演变成粗粒度模仿，其中学生模型无法有效地针对自身的弱点，并且有继承教师推理缺陷的风险。这暴露了一个关键的教学困境：当教师本身不是绝对正确的专家时，如何设计可靠的课程。我们的工作通过利用一个关键的见解来解决这个问题：虽然法学硕士可能在复杂的整体推理中表现出错误，但他们通常在集中的原子子问题上表现出高保真度。基于此，我们提出了发散引导推理课程（DGRC），通过从推理路径的分歧中动态派生出两个互补的课程，构建从原子知识到推理链的学习路径。当学生和教师产生相互冲突的结果时，DGRC 指导教师进行诊断分析：它分析两条推理路径，以制定针对特定分歧点的原子查询，然后自我回答这些查询以创建高置信度的原子问答对。这些对有双重目的：（1）提供原子课程来纠正学生的知识差距，（2）作为事实标准来过滤教师的原始推理链，产生经过验证的 CoT 课程，教学生如何将原子知识整合到完整的推理路径中。在医学和法律领域对不同规模的学生模型进行的实验证明了我们的 DGRC 框架的有效性。值得注意的是，我们的方法在医学领域的 1.5B 学生模型中相对于强的未标记基线实现了 7.76% 的相对改进。
> **Abstract**: Adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) to specialized domains without human-annotated data is a crucial yet formidable challenge. Widely adopted knowledge distillation methods often devolve into coarse-grained mimicry, where the student model inefficiently targets its own weaknesses and risks inheriting the teacher's reasoning flaws. This exposes a critical pedagogical dilemma: how to devise a reliable curriculum when the teacher itself is not an infallible expert. Our work resolves this by capitalizing on a key insight: while LLMs may exhibit fallibility in complex, holistic reasoning, they often exhibit high fidelity on focused, atomic sub-problems. Based on this, we propose Divergence-Guided Reasoning Curriculum (DGRC), which constructs a learning path from atomic knowledge to reasoning chains by dynamically deriving two complementary curricula from disagreements in reasoning pathways. When a student and teacher produce conflicting results, DGRC directs the teacher to perform a diagnostic analysis: it analyzes both reasoning paths to formulate atomic queries that target the specific points of divergence, and then self-answers these queries to create high-confidence atomic question-answer pairs. These pairs then serve a dual purpose: (1) providing an atomic curriculum to rectify the student's knowledge gaps, and (2) serving as factual criteria to filter the teacher's original reasoning chains, yielding a verified CoT curriculum that teaches the student how to integrate atomic knowledge into complete reasoning paths. Experiments across the medical and legal domains on student models of various sizes demonstrate the effectiveness of our DGRC framework. Notably, our method achieves a 7.76% relative improvement for the 1.5B student model in the medical domain over strong unlabeled baseline.

【10】AROMMA: Unifying Olfactory Embeddings for Single Molecules and Mixtures
- **标题**: AROMMA：统一单分子和混合物的嗅觉嵌入
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19561
> **作者**: Dayoung Kang,JongWon Kim,Jiho Park,Keonseock Lee,Ji-Woong Choi,Jinhyun So
> **摘要**: 公共嗅觉数据集很小且分散在单个分子和混合物中，限制了对可概括的气味表示的学习。最近的工作要么学习单分子嵌入，要么通过相似性或成对标签预测来处理混合物，使表示分离且不对齐。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AROMMA，一个学习单分子和两分子混合物的统一嵌入空间的框架。每个分子都由化学基础模型编码，混合物由基于注意力的聚合器组成，确保排列不变性和不对称分子相互作用。我们使用知识蒸馏和类感知伪标记进一步对齐气味描述符集，以丰富缺失的混合物注释。 AROMMA 在单分子和分子对数据集上均实现了最先进的性能，AUROC 提升高达 19.1%，展示了在两个领域的强大泛化能力。
> **Abstract**: Public olfaction datasets are small and fragmented across single molecules and mixtures, limiting learning of generalizable odor representations. Recent works either learn single-molecule embeddings or address mixtures via similarity or pairwise label prediction, leaving representations separate and unaligned. In this work, we propose AROMMA, a framework that learns a unified embedding space for single molecules and two-molecule mixtures. Each molecule is encoded by a chemical foundation model and the mixtures are composed by an attention-based aggregator, ensuring both permutation invariance and asymmetric molecular interactions. We further align odor descriptor sets using knowledge distillation and class-aware pseudo-labeling to enrich missing mixture annotations. AROMMA achieves state-of-the-art performance in both single-molecule and molecule-pair datasets, with up to 19.1% AUROC improvement, demonstrating a robust generalization in two domains.

【11】Scale-Consistent State-Space Dynamics via Fractal of Stationary Transformations
- **标题**: 通过稳态变换的分形实现尺度一致的状态空间动力学
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19551
> **作者**: Geunhyeok Yu,Hyoseok Hwang
> **摘要**: 最近的深度学习模型越来越依赖于深度，而没有对中间表示的有效性进行结构保证，导致早期停止和自适应计算不适定。我们通过在迭代细化过程中制定状态空间模型的尺度一致潜在动力学的结构要求来解决这一限制，并推导出稳态变换分形（FROST），它通过分形归纳偏差强制执行自相似表示流形。在这种几何结构下，中间状态对应于共享表示的不同分辨率，并且我们提供了几何分析，建立了迭代间的收缩和稳定收敛。由于这种规模一致的结构，停止自然地承认由内在特征质量而不是外在目标驱动的基于排名的公式。 ImageNet-100 上的对照实验凭经验验证了预测的尺度一致行为，表明自适应效率来自对齐的潜在几何结构。
> **Abstract**: Recent deep learning models increasingly rely on depth without structural guarantees on the validity of intermediate representations, rendering early stopping and adaptive computation ill-posed. We address this limitation by formulating a structural requirement for state-space model's scale-consistent latent dynamics across iterative refinement, and derive Fractal of Stationary Transformations (FROST), which enforces a self-similar representation manifold through a fractal inductive bias. Under this geometry, intermediate states correspond to different resolutions of a shared representation, and we provide a geometric analysis establishing contraction and stable convergence across iterations. As a consequence of this scale-consistent structure, halting naturally admits a ranking-based formulation driven by intrinsic feature quality rather than extrinsic objectives. Controlled experiments on ImageNet-100 empirically verify the predicted scale-consistent behavior, showing that adaptive efficiency emerges from the aligned latent geometry.

【12】LLM-VA: Resolving the Jailbreak-Overrefusal Trade-off via Vector Alignment
- **标题**: LLM-VA：通过向量对齐解决越狱与过度拒绝的权衡
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19487
> **作者**: Haonan Zhang,Dongxia Wang,Yi Liu,Kexin Chen,Wenhai Wang
> **摘要**: 与安全相关的法学硕士有两种失败模式：越狱（回答有害输入）和过度拒绝（拒绝良性查询）。现有的向量引导方法会调整答案向量的大小，但这会产生一个基本的权衡——减少越狱会增加过度拒绝，反之亦然。我们确定了根本原因：LLM 将答案决策（答案向量 $v_a$）和输入安全判断（良性向量 $v_b$）编码为几乎正交的方向，将它们视为独立的过程。我们提出 LLM-VA，它通过封闭式权重更新将 $v_a$ 与 $v_b$ 对齐，使模型是否愿意根据其安全评估因果关系进行回答 - 无需微调或架构更改。我们的方法使用支持向量机识别每一层的向量，选择与安全相关的层，并通过最小范数权重修改迭代地对齐向量。对 12 个 LLM 的实验表明，LLM-VA 的 F1 比最佳基线高 11.45%，同时保持 95.92% 的效用，并且自动适应每个模型的安全偏差，无需手动调整。代码和模型可在 https://hotbento.github.io/LLM-VA-Web/ 获取。
> **Abstract**: Safety-aligned LLMs suffer from two failure modes: jailbreak (answering harmful inputs) and over-refusal (declining benign queries). Existing vector steering methods adjust the magnitude of answer vectors, but this creates a fundamental trade-off -- reducing jailbreak increases over-refusal and vice versa. We identify the root cause: LLMs encode the decision to answer (answer vector $v_a$) and the judgment of input safety (benign vector $v_b$) as nearly orthogonal directions, treating them as independent processes. We propose LLM-VA, which aligns $v_a$ with $v_b$ through closed-form weight updates, making the model's willingness to answer causally dependent on its safety assessment -- without fine-tuning or architectural changes. Our method identifies vectors at each layer using SVMs, selects safety-relevant layers, and iteratively aligns vectors via minimum-norm weight modifications. Experiments on 12 LLMs demonstrate that LLM-VA achieves 11.45% higher F1 than the best baseline while preserving 95.92% utility, and automatically adapts to each model's safety bias without manual tuning. Code and models are available at https://hotbento.github.io/LLM-VA-Web/.

【13】Time-to-Injury Forecasting in Elite Female Football: A DeepHit Survival Approach
- **标题**: 精英女子足球中的受伤时间预测：DeepHit 生存方法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19479
> **作者**: Victoria Catterall,Cise Midoglu,Stephen Lynch
> **摘要**: 足球运动中发生的伤病给运动员和球队带来了巨大的挑战，给个人、竞技和经济带来后果。虽然机器学习之前已应用于伤病预测，但现有方法通常依赖于静态季前数据和二进制结果，限制了它们在现实世界中的效用。本研究调查了使用 DeepHit 神经网络根据纵向运动员监测数据预测受伤时间的可行性，同时提供可解释的预测。该分析利用了公开的 SoccerMon 数据集，其中包含精英女足球运动员两个赛季的训练、比赛和健康记录。通过清理、特征工程和三种插补策略的应用对数据进行预处理。基线模型（随机森林、XGBoost、逻辑回归）通过网格搜索进行基准测试优化，而使用多层感知器主干实现的 DeepHit 模型则使用时间顺序和留一玩家退出 (LOPO) 验证进行评估。 DeepHit 的一致性指数为 0.762，优于基线模型，并提供个性化、随时间变化的风险估计。 Shapley 附加解释 (SHAP) 确定了与既定风险因素一致的临床相关预测因子，从而增强了可解释性。总体而言，这项研究提供了一个新颖的概念证明：使用 DeepHit 进行的生存建模显示出推进足球损伤预测的巨大潜力，为跨竞技水平的损伤预防提供准确、可解释且可操作的见解。
> **Abstract**: Injury occurrence in football poses significant challenges for athletes and teams, carrying personal, competitive, and financial consequences. While machine learning has been applied to injury prediction before, existing approaches often rely on static pre-season data and binary outcomes, limiting their real-world utility. This study investigates the feasibility of using a DeepHit neural network to forecast time-to-injury from longitudinal athlete monitoring data, while providing interpretable predictions. The analysis utilised the publicly available SoccerMon dataset, containing two seasons of training, match, and wellness records from elite female footballers. Data was pre-processed through cleaning, feature engineering, and the application of three imputation strategies. Baseline models (Random Forest, XGBoost, Logistic Regression) were optimised via grid search for benchmarking, while the DeepHit model, implemented with a multilayer perceptron backbone, was evaluated using chronological and leave-one-player-out (LOPO) validation. DeepHit achieved a concordance index of 0.762, outperforming baseline models and delivering individualised, time-varying risk estimates. Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) identified clinically relevant predictors consistent with established risk factors, enhancing interpretability. Overall, this study provides a novel proof of concept: survival modelling with DeepHit shows strong potential to advance injury forecasting in football, offering accurate, explainable, and actionable insights for injury prevention across competitive levels.

【14】APC-RL: Exceeding Data-Driven Behavior Priors with Adaptive Policy Composition
- **标题**: APC-RL：通过自适应策略组合超越数据驱动的行为先验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.19452
> **作者**: Finn Rietz,Pedro Zuidberg dos Martires,Johannes Andreas Stork
> **摘要**: 将演示数据纳入强化学习（RL）可以极大地加速学习，但现有方法通常假设演示是最佳的并且与目标任务完全一致。在实践中，演示常常是稀疏的、次优的或未对齐的，当这些演示集成到 RL 中时，这可能会降低性能。我们提出了自适应策略组合（APC），这是一种分层模型，可以自适应地组合多个数据驱动的标准化流（NF）先验。 APC 不是严格遵守先验知识，而是估计每个先验知识对目标任务的适用性，同时利用它们进行探索。此外，APC 要么完善有用的先验，要么在必要时回避不一致的先验以优化下游奖励。在不同的基准测试中，APC 在演示对齐时可以加速学习，在严重错位的情况下保持稳健，并利用次优演示来引导探索，同时避免由于过于严格遵守次优演示而导致性能下降。
> **Abstract**: Incorporating demonstration data into reinforcement learning (RL) can greatly accelerate learning, but existing approaches often assume demonstrations are optimal and fully aligned with the target task. In practice, demonstrations are frequently sparse, suboptimal, or misaligned, which can degrade performance when these demonstrations are integrated into RL. We propose Adaptive Policy Composition (APC), a hierarchical model that adaptively composes multiple data-driven Normalizing Flow (NF) priors.
